subject: New Year, same Chuck

---
Dear Friends and Supporters,

It's a New Year, but for me, not much has changed because I'm working as hard as ever.

This morning, I woke up at 4 a.m. like I always do, went on a run, and ate breakfast with Barbara.

This year I'll work every day for Iowa, I'll hold at least one Q&A in all 99 counties in our state, and I'll always fight for you.

The only thing changing this year is the goals we **_will_** accomplish.

I am writing to ask for your help and support in my continued service to the people of Iowa. The new Congress means new opportunities to get our priorities across the finish line and hold the line on reckless spending. It also means the far Left will have a target on the back of everyone fighting for the values we hold dear.

I need your support to get our economy back on track, secure our border, and hold our government accountable. With your help, I will continue to serve the people of Iowa and ensure the government works for the people, not the other way around.

**_[I am grateful for any donation or support you can provide. Click here to donate now.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=a3f9a965647343f28bdd9903c23b7da0&_e=Ekrg6AGOtcH4wFdIvK-uOddSORO65FItDQW6ZLlbuVNhepwXMNO9kI7fx0vxSBcgIJM36fAa1q6mhGSrTi8UTpAaSjXBrcX4gB0RE9zY9ib5axpP4roGz4lb7udTXlLqAxjBITYl37NusjYYsQssVMa__Hiu7hIGXvV0NmnNZp12HDJ5xNdPai3AMMZ2MfXOxt_9u7jXbuim808DEAlj4jOUBSCf0JHcEWWqRUzy8_2NFF7eHbK32jEymwy17SiM9s5l_0wQUTGnkTS543UknDXCoqd2qLDK6qzsqk7gcMcGoQT-c1ODLKSzUPdDdVtRuz_oYU6taSX-VjJPF99WRELtnJ3eEQ92WKVnhqQS-sfur_JmuTbJFc-BN4msslC8nk3j0tcDmYXIvOlsIo7h0MK94Zn86hm3dMDCt3g_JlcGVkiBpBe2W0kgCH0ZLXfkTYqnEAR_72X2OZzsJAh9bi7_IErTgdjWzP8gep6Zpxw8WD_Mj8hngyQAoK3GDVPF)_

Sincerely,

subject: It Worked!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_deal_was_good&n=1)
---
## It Worked!
Friend, The Covid cultist media has gone on the attack against patriots again, this time targeting conservative Senator Nathan Wesenberg for his comments at a medical freedom rally in the State Capitol. Senator Wesenberg stated the Covid vax is a “death shot” and the fake news media is having a field day over it. The Star Tribune, Minnesota Reformer, Grand Rapids Herald-Review, and many other outlets reported on this story with a level of vitriol and disrespect. Many of these stories demean patriotic citizens like you and me simply for rejecting an experimental shot or questioning the narrative. They want their readers to believe that people like us are the outrageous ones.
## Meanwhile, Tim Walz was the one that got it all wrong!!!
He's the tyrant who locked us in our homes, shut down our businesses, kept our kids out of school, closed churches for our faith community, mandated masks, and coerced individuals to get a shot with taxpayer funded propaganda. **On top of this, Walz and Ellison sent Lisa Hanson to jail simply for opening her coffee shop!** The reason the media has gone on the attack is because Wesenberg is telling the truth! We have seen far too many deaths, injuries, diseases, and side-effects of the covid vax on individuals of all sizes, ages, and sex. The more evidence that comes out about these shots, the more “conspiracy theorists” are proven correct! The Democrats and media are on their heels because the truth is getting uncovered. Thanks to the Twitter Files release by Elon Musk, we are now learning the great lengths that government and Big Tech went to silence us. **There's a new energy abound...and it's not only in the realm of COVID politics.** A group of conservative Representatives in Congress withheld their votes for Kevin McCarthy until they received major concessions and the ability to push a truly conservative agenda. You may have been following along with us at Action 4 Liberty, as we live streamed four days of the coverage on our new show, **The Truth Hurts**. (Be sure to subscribe to our channel [Rumble](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfEIuAko19Ai_LkCriEZS1P0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_deal_was_good&n=2)) Representatives Andy Biggs, Lauren Boebert, Eli Crane, Matt Gaetz, Bob Good, and Matt Rosendale stood up for their principles to force McCarthy to bend to the will of the American people! They got forced votes, rule changes, and investigations lined up that would have never happened if they did not pressure the DC Swamp! See all of the important reforms [here](https://www.action4liberty.com/congressional_conservatives_win_major_reforms_in_historic_speaker_battle?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_deal_was_good&n=3)! The confrontational model of politics used by these conservatives delivered results! While people like Dan Crenshaw and Marjorie Taylor Greene showed unwavering loyalty to McCarthy, a small handful of conservatives were getting results for the American people.
## Confrontational politics works!
We know the recipe for success in politics and it starts with citizens pressuring their elected legislators to stand up for _We The People_! Our Rights are not up for debate, they come from God and no virus or politician can tell us otherwise. If we allow the downward spiral of our state and country, we will have nothing left. We have to rally behind our fighters and never let the crooked politicians go unwatched. At Action 4 Liberty, we expose corrupt politicians and the lying corporate media. As informed citizens, it is our responsibility to fight these frauds and stick it to the Establishment! We discuss these important battles in our latest episode of **The Truth Hurts**.

clean_body: | It Worked! Friend, The Covid cultist media has gone on the attack against patriots again, this time targeting conservative Senator Nathan Wesenberg for his comments at a medical freedom rally in the State Capitol. Senator Wesenberg stated the Covid vax is a “death shot” and the fake news media is having a field day over it. The Star Tribune, Minnesota Reformer, Grand Rapids Herald-Review, and many other outlets reported on this story with a level of vitriol and disrespect. Many of these stories demean patriotic citizens like you and me simply for rejecting an experimental shot or questioning the narrative. They want their readers to believe that people like us are the outrageous ones. Meanwhile, Tim Walz was the one that got it all wrong!!! He's the tyrant who locked us in our homes, shut down our businesses, kept our kids out of school, closed churches for our faith community, mandated masks, and coerced individuals to get a shot with taxpayer funded propaganda. On top of this, Walz and Ellison sent Lisa Hanson to jail simply for opening her coffee shop! The reason the media has gone on the attack is because Wesenberg is telling the truth! We have seen far too many deaths, injuries, diseases, and side-effects of the covid vax on individuals of all sizes, ages, and sex. The more evidence that comes out about these shots, the more “conspiracy theorists” are proven correct! The Democrats and media are on their heels because the truth is getting uncovered. Thanks to the Twitter Files release by Elon Musk, we are now learning the great lengths that government and Big Tech went to silence us. There's a new energy abound...and it's not only in the realm of COVID politics. A group of conservative Representatives in Congress withheld their votes for Kevin McCarthy until they received major concessions and the ability to push a truly conservative agenda. You may have been following along with us at Action 4 Liberty, as we live streamed four days of the coverage on our new show, The Truth Hurts. (Be sure to subscribe to our channel ) Representatives Andy Biggs, Lauren Boebert, Eli Crane, Matt Gaetz, Bob Good, and Matt Rosendale stood up for their principles to force McCarthy to bend to the will of the American people! They got forced votes, rule changes, and investigations lined up that would have never happened if they did not pressure the DC Swamp! See all of the important reforms ! The confrontational model of politics used by these conservatives delivered results! While people like Dan Crenshaw and Marjorie Taylor Greene showed unwavering loyalty to McCarthy, a small handful of conservatives were getting results for the American people. Confrontational politics works! We know the recipe for success in politics and it starts with citizens pressuring their elected legislators to stand up for We The People! Our Rights are not up for debate, they come from God and no virus or politician can tell us otherwise. If we allow the downward spiral of our state and country, we will have nothing left. We have to rally behind our fighters and never let the crooked politicians go unwatched. At Action 4 Liberty, we expose corrupt politicians and the lying corporate media. As informed citizens, it is our responsibility to fight these frauds and stick it to the Establishment! We discuss these important battles in our latest episode of The Truth Hurts. WATCH on Rumble: Thank you for joining our fight. Remember, our mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. Failure is not an option! Jake Duesenberg Action 4 Liberty | "Support Us"

**TO:** Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
**FROM:** Peter
**SUBJECT:** Congrats! 🎉

To our new House Minority Leader, Hakeem Jeffries,

_CONGRATULATIONS!_ I’m so excited that you and the next generation of Democratic leaders have officially been sworn into our 118th Congress.

We know that you are an incredible fit for this role, and we can’t wait to see what you accomplish.

**Despite House Republicans taking back the House majority, I know that you are prepared to face their extreme MAGA agenda, and I know you will do whatever it takes to defend our Democracy.**

clean_body: State Democrats just flipped the seat in Virginia’s Senate! | | | | | BREAKING: State Democrats just flipped our first seat of 2023! Tonight’s victory will send another strong leader to the Virginia Senate – one of our top targets this year. We’re less than two weeks into the new year and Democrats have already notched our first victory! But there’s little time to celebrate: In the upcoming weeks, there are EVEN MORE special elections. In Pennsylvania, we must win to hold our narrow chamber margins. And in New Hampshire, we could flip control of the New Hampshire House for Democrats through special elections this year! With chamber margins as slim as the ones we have, special elections like these can have a real impact on Democratic power in the states. But Republicans are looking for any opportunity to build power after big losses in November – so we can’t let up for even one day. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Our fight isn’t over – we’re gearing up for upcoming special elections in New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and many other states. Remember: There are no off years for state Democrats – we have elections every year, and not just in November. Now is the time to dig deep and lay the groundwork for future elections. Despite tonight’s victory, winning elections isn’t easy. This level of the ballot is often overlooked and underfunded. It’s why we’re relying on grassroots donors to pitch in. Your gifts help to mobilize voters, boost our digital strategy, and fund our analytics programs – all critical to our campaigns scoring victories just like tonight. Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

body:
We want to make sure Hillary knows we have her back every step of the way, and we know she would appreciate a note of congratulations from top supporters like you to celebrate her official swearing-in!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57188560/387105368/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230111-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkY2U2Ni1iODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vw33VD-gM2dPpBZfMqt4dJAdI63YoLEYaE476pvsddY=)

| Folks,

After days of Republican-led chaos, **Hillary was officially sworn in to the House of Representatives over the weekend and is already hard at work fighting for West Michiganders.** We are so excited to have such a strong leader advocating for us in Congress, and we know that she will always prioritize the issues that matter to West Michigan. [_**Will you sign our card to congratulate Hillary today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57188565/387105386/855250106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkY2U2Ni1iODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vw33VD-gM2dPpBZfMqt4dJAdI63YoLEYaE476pvsddY=&emci=55ea3942-878b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=bebdce66-b891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=750857)

Hear me out. I wouldn’t give a gun to my daughter. I’m a little more traditional about protecting my family. But in this world, it’s just plain STUPID to not have some form of defense on yuo at all times. I needed to give my little girl something that would make her, and make me, _feel safe_. Enter:[ THE REBEL BATON](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11230/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/011a75e4df1cb76a5fcb516c8b99c1b970527468) This masterpiece of a tool combines two of the most practical and most-used defense mechanisms ever used in a violent situation. You see, You need light. Then you need something able to bash things with. This weapon combines those two elements into [one extremely portable gadget.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11230/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/011a75e4df1cb76a5fcb516c8b99c1b970527468) My daughter keeps it in her bag at all times. The confidence she has knowing she will always have an item that will keep her safe is invaluable. The peace of mind I have with my family and especially, my daughter, is second to none. This is legal (for now). [Get it before something happens.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11230/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/011a75e4df1cb76a5fcb516c8b99c1b970527468)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Counting on your input, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Grassroots supporters like you are the reason Democrats defied all of the polls and pundits in 2022 — not only defending our 50-50 Senate majority but _expanding_ it. **So, now that I'm officially up for reelection in this new cycle, I need your help.**
Republicans right here in New York were able to flip a concerning number of seats red in November, so we have zero room for error as Democrats face one of our toughest election maps _in decades_ heading into 2024. **But I know we can protect this seat and our majority as long as your input and priorities are powering us forward.**
**So please, I'm personally asking:[Will you take two minutes to share your thoughts with me in a brief survey right now? This is the best way for me to make sure that your priorities are my priorities in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57193827/387126706/-222150965?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3853-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FlYWQ1Yy1jMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07k1zz4lEafHeS23jHnejY1WeIC9qZiq3GghMHEHlvo=&emci=b7ade860-3e90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b7aead5c-c191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57193828/387126724/-222150965?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3853-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FlYWQ1Yy1jMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07k1zz4lEafHeS23jHnejY1WeIC9qZiq3GghMHEHlvo=&emci=b7ade860-3e90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b7aead5c-c191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)
---
**Democrats have to defend 23 Senate seats next year — _including mine._ **And Republicans only have to flip two of them to hand control back to Mitch McConnell. With so much momentum behind the GOP in New York right now, there's zero question that this seat is going to be a top target.
**But while the GOP turns to their wealthy, special interest allies, I'm turning to you. My focus has always been on you — the priorities, concerns and issues that are at the top of your mind. So please, friend, can I count on your responses?**
**[Please take our quick priorities survey now to share your thoughts with me. It will only take a couple minutes, and it will be such a big help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57193829/387126745/-222150965?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3853-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FlYWQ1Yy1jMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07k1zz4lEafHeS23jHnejY1WeIC9qZiq3GghMHEHlvo=&emci=b7ade860-3e90-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b7aead5c-c191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**
Thank you. I look forward to reading your responses.

Kirsten Gillibrand
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=VYTYGdZVwd8dNXplc7peSjIp9I%2BdwGZkWVTH%2BG0NRwrgwPEeb6npYOxVeN0cKGVdwsGsUne9Q%2FioVSwdAsOB5E2Z6cYnr2KJkKpGw89zPJGckQgKa%2FRjxuO5BaFU7aBI%2BrxJB0AVTcSA%2Feho4JVf5VxxEw2eWZP3OmLMciFWNHrqaSobs%2Bk7Pe43buyA7Rnfi6lUh7N%2F5kcsX7WhF2zSRJUc4oU6WzPGkQkNmekns2xsG%2FFhYe9ecy1Q%2FISWXTizDtYMBmGvthuy8tStbWRmINTKeuvPLgqX84jW7m%2BSJheRHgur2rfZZKCpWKPrLjelygPjQ4I247rQay%2BtLsfYS2dxjNmcgrFV52adsr8cS0sBVpeec3diAcv9bkNq%2F9Wlhoow86UTYPkKFIJzIGvca%2BHms4ufx7oObAuuA242pec%3D).

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Help me kick off my first term
body:
Peter, As your Congressman, I can finally get to work and fight for you. I voted to strip $72 billion in funding from the IRS on Monday.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, As your Congressman, I can finally get to work and _fight for you_.**I voted to strip $72 billion in funding from the IRS on Monday.** The Biden Administration allocated this money to hire 87,000 IRS agents to harass American families and businesses. Instead, we should support police officers, border patrol agents, and servicemembers.**I look forward to finding more ways to protect the American people and slash federal spending.** This was a promise I made on the campaign trail.[**Will you help me kick off my term right and chip in $25, $50, $100 or ANY AMOUNT today?**](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-y/) [DONATE $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-j/) [DONATE $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-i/) [DONATE $100 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-d/) [DONATE $250 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-h/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nhuhho-iubikjttk-k/) As your Congressman,
-> **I will KEEP money in your pockets.**
-> **I will ADVOCATE for you.** Sincerely,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-nhuhho-iubikjttk-u/)
---

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

name: Andy Biggs
subject: Lies, lies, and more lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62189736:JJuKu-GNe:m:1:3331421248:7092DB3AB1CEEA07FABBD4B6E81F074C:r)
---
| Peter,
Remember when the Left couldn't stop screaming about how Russia "rigged" the 2016 election?
You and I knew it was a lie all along...and now, **a major study from New York University confirms that "RUSSIA RUSSIA RUSSIA" was an election-denying "Big Lie" from the very beginning.**
The entire Russian Collusion Delusion was a sham and so was the phony impeachment Democrats used to defame and shame President Trump.
It's time we get retribution for the Democrats' frivolous lies and disgraceful behavior...and we can make this happen now that we have a House majority.
But in order to do so, I'll need to get my fellow colleagues on board and the message out to millions of Americans. **[Can I count on you to join me in my fight to expose the Democrats?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62189736:JJuKu-GNe:m:1:3331421248:7092DB3AB1CEEA07FABBD4B6E81F074C:r)** | | | | [EXPOSE THE LIES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62189736:JJuKu-GNe:m:1:3331421248:7092DB3AB1CEEA07FABBD4B6E81F074C:r)
---
We cannot sit back now that the Russian Collusion Delusion is confirmed to be one of the biggest political lies in US history.

**Democrats knew Russian interference did little to sway voter opinion, and so did we, yet they still used it to delegitimize President Trump and destroy his public image.**

Now is our best shot to expose every single Democrat who supported this lie, especially the ones who used it to launch the sham impeachment.

**[I'll need your support right away](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62189736:JJuKu-GNe:m:1:3331421248:7092DB3AB1CEEA07FABBD4B6E81F074C:r)** to demand my Republican colleagues work with me to get this information out to millions of Americans. Together we can demand action, but it'll take us all.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62189736:JJuKu-GNe:m:1:3331421248:7092DB3AB1CEEA07FABBD4B6E81F074C:r)
---
|

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr6h8i8v09edetub9vsp78ug0e0d0cigrkpbkrag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t9m65pr0o36eepm9pdic9gm6s9leeo60shhcdh72p75m5i67db0s2o6ashnm1rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p76phlciqr4o3nc1j7co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmepj1clgm9o70s8iv0)

---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcqivpv7q3eth6640bb3emhtlbckfreuip84rsg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpvpgbobkogls4tkdjagf6i9p3apa5dt5q942sng_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zou855ifqgbdur64fhs47u3hsfdtda7995s64h68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhonao8jo39g3j2hn2v0aoa4msvq1ufsjvvfhrm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlgqhc2vphttg2t72uces1oubt53a8i1g28l28h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5qlvtgf02s369u02kesgqalur8im7v594gdos28_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0vodtatvav4tfg10ell5d55t3e8aqd5d7s029h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs5do21agpl3cbceji9d48dgn4ins9oto0ddte68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zso21cp0tqkk283di812cmeia314dfs7a5fmkmrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqrnfpbcottlr77e1bjljbo6brbba9ug0gmk9108_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4jocsj8bp2f3q3ft05t6g26ostk0am9324l30v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5im2p70s3h2bs "RedWaveFooter")

name: C7 Tac
subject: When nature smacks you, it’s time to fight back
body:
I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...
| |
---
| |
---
---
| | _January 11th, 2023
_
---
|
---
| | Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11232/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c90801b72c5be0c4a42007512e43330bd48e14c3) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11232/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c90801b72c5be0c4a42007512e43330bd48e14c3)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, [go here now](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11232/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c90801b72c5be0c4a42007512e43330bd48e14c3) and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,

---
| | |
---

name: Dan Kildee
subject: What issues are you focused on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi, it’s Dan. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we had a decisive win in the last election. But our victory didn’t happen by accident — it was thanks to our incredible team of grassroots supporters.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.**

If we’re going to win again, I’ll need support and input from folks like you. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll be one of the 2,000 supporters we need to take my short, 2023 Priorities Survey before it closes in 48 hours. **[Click here to take the survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57200710/387153835/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230111_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAyOWY4MS1kMzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0xnBDP6txbGVt5p7BqWKpr3nceaXq5cWCEpsuwabDg=&emci=6d5a4f14-d091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=06029f81-d391-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57200711/387153836/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230111_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAyOWY4MS1kMzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0xnBDP6txbGVt5p7BqWKpr3nceaXq5cWCEpsuwabDg=&emci=6d5a4f14-d091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=06029f81-d391-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
I’m also excited to share that I will serve in leadership in this new Congress as co-chair of the House Democratic Steering and Policy Committee. This role will give me the opportunity to help set Democrats’ agenda for working families in Congress.

As I begin this new role, and we begin a new session of Congress, I need to hear from you. Your input is vital. It guides my work in Congress and helps my campaign make sure we address the most pressing issues you and your family are facing.

**[With that in mind, please take 2 minutes to complete my 2023 Priorities Survey before it closes in 48 hours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57200712/387153837/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230111_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAyOWY4MS1kMzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0xnBDP6txbGVt5p7BqWKpr3nceaXq5cWCEpsuwabDg=&emci=6d5a4f14-d091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=06029f81-d391-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/jan23-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57200713/387153838/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230111_SV_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAyOWY4MS1kMzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0xnBDP6txbGVt5p7BqWKpr3nceaXq5cWCEpsuwabDg=&emci=6d5a4f14-d091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=06029f81-d391-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

Dan

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We all witnessed the chaos and dysfunction as it took Republican seditionists 15 ballots to finally elect Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House--after he made deals to weaken his office to the point where he'll likely be gone in a year.
body:
Quick update ... & some great swag!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f86db65-8f48-46d0-803e-3f8bee038c50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I hope your week is going great! To keep you in the know, here’s an edition of our short newsletter: *** ****We all [witnessed the chaos and dysfunction as it took Republican seditionists ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T278f9972-6080-4509-adee-83a4ea3018f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)15 ballots to finally elect Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House**\--after he made deals to weaken his office to the point where he'll likely be gone in a year. Don't take this prediction lightly. [We predicted a fight would break out on the House floor in this video, and within 24 hours it had.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T299be201-d662-49c3-8e33-2e5ad35dce5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Watch here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j6u738EZw0k](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbefd659d-a8c1-47a7-9190-7fda6c6e4e26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And in case you have forgotten how pathetic that whole display was by the House GOP Caucus, here are key moments, and lotsa popcorn: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UWelNJH69b8](https://default.salsalabs.org/T966bca65-0cbd-40ec-a9fa-e704a2fd4fba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Sadly, **Trumpian insurrection has gone global**. This weekend, pro-Jair Bolsonaro (defeated authoritarian in the last election) loons attacked the Brazilian government, claiming he really won and the election was rigged. Sound familiar? At the time, Bolsonaro was at...Mar-a-Lago, of course! You know what they say about fascists of a feather... To be clear: Bolsonaro should be expelled forthwith from the U.S. **Blue Amp Action had a great moment over the holidays! **Cliff innocently sent out a tweet about a fantastic Christmas gift (I was humbled to join the "Secret Jewish Space Laser Corps," which, I might add, is "Mazel Tough!”). The result was overwhelming feedback like "it's the funniest shirt I've ever seen" and "WHERE DID YOU GET THAT SHIRT!?," as the tweet rocketed to virality, seen by over 500,000 people. Well, because of those reactions and the overall response, Blue Amp Action got itself a [new sponsor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c0d5cb1-bcc4-42af-86b7-c799cf71d2b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! Here is the tweet I sent out, with the gift courtesy of my wonderful wife, [who bought it at Dissent Pins](https://default.salsalabs.org/T248a41e6-c0cd-484b-ab13-127eb82685d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5fcfcd6-de57-40d6-a665-9b9ea7046969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Dissent Pins who not only makes this outstanding shirt, though, but a ton of more great merchandise, including hilarious & inspiring pins, stickers, shirts, patches, jewelry, charms, magnets and more](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65ecbb39-dc2f-4927-9c32-e2d7bf4169af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! **_I've loved wearing my Jewish Space Laser Corps t-shirt. I love the message and the reactions it gets. Also, it's comfortable as hell. And I love supporting this great company and the fantastic causes it helps fund!_** Half of Dissent Pins' profits go to progressive orgs working on issues such as helping Ukraine's survival or protecting abortion rights here at home. They've given nearly $1 million so far to great causes! So...[Do you need a Secret Jewish Laser Corps ("Mazel Tough") t-shirt (how could you not?!) How about Ukrainian Easter Egg Jewelry, "I'm Vaccinated" baseball caps, "Send Elon To Space" stickers or a "Gazpacho Police" patch? Dissent Pins makes these and dozens more products like them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T145e8cf7-130d-4432-aea1-5efcc17cf6b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f050975-fd25-46f8-8e7d-65123a914687/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [So go to Dissent Pins to get these and other awesome collectibles (a "Build Your Own Conspiracy Theory Kit?," or a "Thanks Science" charm or "Pride Flag" keychain!!)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T888a5379-c9c7-4a24-9750-9f1e346213b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) while supporting causes you care about! I mean, how can you not love ... Ruth Bader Pinsberg?? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d014f72-30b4-442d-81c4-12656aa42408/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **And now, a bit more from our newsletter:** * You may have seen where George Santos flashed a white power signal while he voted for Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. He made it quite obvious for the cameras: [A reminder of the 3 reasons this awful human was elected, and how to prevent the election of this kind o](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08e2b3ac-586e-4487-81ec-572f8c160dbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)f GOP conman in the future: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xj9G_zPXsiE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ea9854f-0516-4091-9ebd-3dafd457a8fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Additionally, when it comes to their own, Republicans aren't shy about shanking them when they begin to see them as a liability. Santos may think he's a member of the club and do whatever it takes to be in that club, but he'll wanna have eyes on the back of his head going forward: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TuSZdOLs48E](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd03d689-c787-434b-8aab-379161c96289/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \--- **Before we let you go:** _[**A reminder that Dissent Pins makes hilarious and inspiring merchandise at a low price and are a Blue Amp Action sponsor! We love their work and feel strongly about who they are--fighting for the same values as all of us. So if you need a gift, or just want a good laugh, get yourself some merch at Dissent Pins!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb02f0a51-bb88-4306-9b36-b19d9448c886/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5e1aeae-aa95-49a0-98e2-494050288e13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57201581/387156750/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgxY2ViMS1kODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__vWlneFEJQMlEFOSn8oD_NAeecpWOFVBuwGGYGFbMU=&emci=8881ceb1-d891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=8b81ceb1-d891-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,
Last week, the Department of Justice issued a legal opinion clearing the U.S. Postal Service to deliver abortion pills to states that have restricted abortion access.**This means Texans should be able to receive FDA-approved abortion medication via mail, from an out of state sender, without prosecution.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57201582/387156751/-1752571451?refcode=em-20230111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgxY2ViMS1kODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__vWlneFEJQMlEFOSn8oD_NAeecpWOFVBuwGGYGFbMU=)
**This is an important step from the Biden Administration to increase abortion access for Texans and people in any state that has banned abortion.** And it’s an example of how we can use executive action to make a difference for working families _now._
**Peter, my team and I are working on creative strategies like this to chip away at Texas’ abortion ban — with the goal of completely overturning these bans by organizing across the country.[Now is the time to organize for 2024 so we can flip the house, end the filibuster, and fully restore abortion rights in Congress — will you chip in what you can to help us in this fight for self-determination?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57201583/387156752/-1752571451?refcode=em-20230111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjgxY2ViMS1kODkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__vWlneFEJQMlEFOSn8oD_NAeecpWOFVBuwGGYGFbMU=)**

Last summer, we shared with many of you our letter to the Biden Administration, signed by more than 50 Texas Democrats and abortion rights organizations, asking for protections for mailing abortion medication into the state. **We can continue to make progress with the White House on abortion rights through our continued advocacy.**
Today, I’ll be on the House floor fighting against Republican bills that further restrict abortion rights. And tomorrow, I’ll be back at work to get people in Republican-controlled states expanded rights.
It took 50 years to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , Peter. We need to be in this for the long haul. name: Sarah Longwell
subject: The MAGAs run the House

body:
|

Friend,

No matter what kind of week you had last week, it had to have been better than what Kevin McCarthy just went through. Now that he finally got what he wanted after a historic 15 rounds of voting, he’s made clear who he’s serving. With everyone from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Paul Gosar backing him, it’s clear that the MAGA extremists in the House are the ones pulling the strings. [**Listen to the warning I gave about what a Speaker Kevin McCarthy means for things like the debt ceiling and funding Ukraine aid:**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/MV-87DvGLmLW2D6Xks4t3mzPW5r_q0D4VH4JkN95jt9m3q90JV1-WJV7CgKYkN8Xx8LqXvKZ_W7nYLjF6r9s2cW5tdp6r6L_tKDW482xN531gVFHN60FJ_RdKVQ2W8v_zKk71Y2fMW1s_37y8QbNj7W5y9bmF65yhFMW1hyPCX1HKqXZVN4pd96WZ_7hM5VnbP6M1GzW34K-7_5rRcY1W91CtJ51YVknLW8C_pRh3m4_9xW8vccZx7ff9RbVGRJn983V3VwW2h2Xv58785bfW5jcFl2582q2XW2nWrqG2YNZ4kW82t0HD3lLhK7W6x1lF68g2z_FN6VR55-3pH9PW98bMD_4dXDGRF1qcRM1xPCmW6HYGRs5xYbGDW94s7695WsH4nN4wzgcPJYTRGW6WctlZ4g2FgZ3gpR1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/MV-87DvGLmLW2D6Xks4t3mzPW5r_q0D4VH4JkN95jt9m3q90JV1-WJV7CgFWLW1_kfBR1yJXvTW1vPSdS5J7zVzVcMfjB3C2Ck9V2hHcD7qLmZGW6htYNh1DyZ3dVY5BxJ6HYdcJVVXKcF2r_Mn2W4rBsxq5br4kbW84CMnD40XZlFW2SZMs67jSf9-W4-pCGt46hjJDW1QN0cy4zfP0kN1hcj7zbHDkbW46hfC13y9MCXW17PDq82MfhJ2W4F46324l5wdmW1rQJ315wdSP3W6k0YRT8-WyzhW2ds_hT5rrnVtW1ZzvDn5mV7ZjW2n6BKt5Q8QV_W1Vb7BL2_npNhMHwrfGKYdqfW20Br3w8HxwsLW7Fq4lX779LKBW4-Y-Wp4DnkszW3xTLng6L5BL9W6_ZF8W7jnncY3nlq1)
---
We don’t even know all the concessions Kevin made to get the speaker's gavel. I want to make one thing clear—Kevin wasn’t pressured by the MAGA extremists. He’s one of them.
##
All you need to do is remember his vote to reject the 2020 election results, his pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago mere weeks after January 6, his ousting of Liz Cheney for her impeachment vote, and Trump's support of him for speaker. It's clear where his allegiance lies.
##
Kevin is as MAGA as they come. We’re ready to fight back.
##
Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

Did you know that two years ago this week, John Fetterman began his campaign for U.S. Senate? | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Did you know that two years ago this week, John Fetterman began his campaign for U.S. Senate? It’s clear that his pro-choice, pro-union, pro-working families message resonated with the people of Pennsylvania because now, two years later, John is Pennsylvania’s newest Senator. Although it’s been a week since Senator Fetterman’s swearing-in, we’re still riding that high!
---
---
As you know, Fetterman was the only candidate to flip a Senate seat in the entire country, giving Democrats a 51-50 majority. Since Republicans won back the majority in the House, holding the Senate is more important than ever. That’s why we’re still so excited about his win! We can’t wait to see how our Democratic coalition in Congress shows up for us in 2023. As Fetterman’s election shows, Pennsylvania Democrats get it done. With 3 special elections in Pennsylvania House Districts 32, 34, and 35 next month, we’re hoping to win big again. name: Wes Moore
subject: In one week, I’ll be sworn in
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57203128/387161783/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230111deadline6_wm_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTVlZmExZC1kYjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KX024vynpXE_kV1k8KyV9VK48YW_DERgV4Djt0OP5vo=)
---
Friends, Time has really flown by, and**in just one week from today, I will be sworn in as your next Governor of Maryland.** I can’t tell you how honored and excited I am. We went from polling at one percent in this competitive gubernatorial primary race to building a diverse, statewide movement of people ready for a Maryland that will leave no one behind. Aruna and I have spent the last couple of months putting together a dedicated, skilled team to manage our administration and deliver on the pressing issues impacting Marylanders, like unlocking opportunities for work, wages, and wealth, creating a 21st century transportation system, creating more affordable housing, addressing climate change, and so much more. **But as soon as I’m sworn in to office and we begin our work to deliver for Maryland, our campaign has to stop all fundraising until the legislative session ends in April.** While most campaigns can fundraise throughout the year to fund their operations and outreach efforts, we’re limited to raising money in shorter amounts of time, which is why we have to reach our big goal before the freeze begins. **[With just seven days left until Aruna and I officially serve you, we have just seven days left to hit our $30,000 goal. This movement is fueled by grassroots donors like you pitching in whatever you can afford. Will you pitch in $10 or $25 today to support us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57203129/387161784/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230111deadline6_wm_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTVlZmExZC1kYjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KX024vynpXE_kV1k8KyV9VK48YW_DERgV4Djt0OP5vo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friends, Time has really flown by, andin just one week from today, I will be sworn in as your next Governor of Maryland. I can’t tell you how honored and excited I am. We went from polling at one percent in this competitive gubernatorial primary race to building a diverse, statewide movement of people ready for a Maryland that will leave no one behind. Aruna and I have spent the last couple of months putting together a dedicated, skilled team to manage our administration and deliver on the pressing issues impacting Marylanders, like unlocking opportunities for work, wages, and wealth, creating a 21st century transportation system, creating more affordable housing, addressing climate change, and so much more. But as soon as I’m sworn in to office and we begin our work to deliver for Maryland, our campaign has to stop all fundraising until the legislative session ends in April. While most campaigns can fundraise throughout the year to fund their operations and outreach efforts, we’re limited to raising money in shorter amounts of time, which is why we have to reach our big goal before the freeze begins. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done to help get us here. Like I always say, it’s a movement, not a moment. Let’s sustain it for the long haul and move Maryland forward! Elevate, Wes ** | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childr
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zonkhb0oc8d47o0f41bl68dftljqkm3ja0ih00s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5prbhq82l16rgufjuhhtf8alg7f1ddsplkkuk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5o9ndvob403l9uf67ahfch14hu7s29n79f0qmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlg05fcdoda1rq4lrchc5r86n0571tml0dn9hud8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37ils8u8upqjouesmgsgeoh4fchninemfvbtpvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z837mvt7n9khkm3e0n85iter2mj3o8fjopf4r1m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm0pr5chh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0330%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Qw4m52jdor7j9XWWQOpswg&sysid=1)
Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655314%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LxDqVZFIZ6emQVyQ1RmPcw&sysid=1)
|
---

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655325%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lWJMmAnOEfA7yoPo0nj6tg&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655326%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RNkVEp4N61YiAHgOdDPSyA&sysid=1) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more ...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655327%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xUZj%2b%2fx2XPpGqIfF%2f6tRfA&sysid=1)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655328%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7F2kwDBovA7PZl%2bNnUVABg&sysid=1)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GHEfGtohtgtX8o8NCOvuCA&sysid=1)

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0330%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Qw4m52jdor7j9XWWQOpswg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0330%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Qw4m52jdor7j9XWWQOpswg&sysid=1)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I need to hear from supporters like you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
The only way we can keep Nevada blue is if we build a winning strategy fueled by your on-the-ground insights.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57206862/387163555/-146199797?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2290-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzk3OWQ2MS1kZjkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzigaVFri1NQ7HrKGJHg_IDKn5bsVgeMy2S9YTaVx6I=&emci=2dac4ee5-6390-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=53979d61-df91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)
Friend,

I’m so grateful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side as we work to make positive change for families in Nevada and across the country. And I’m especially grateful to have you with me as I face my first reelection fight.
In 2022, Nevada decided control of the Senate: My friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto defended her seat by _less than 1 percentage point. _It was the most competitive Senate race of the midterm elections.
**Now, experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control – so I need your urgent help. The only way we can keep Nevada blue is if we build a winning strategy fueled by _your _on-the-ground insights. It's critical that your priorities and concerns are at the forefront of our campaign.**
**[So please, friend, will you take a moment now to tell me which issues are most important to you? Friend,

This won't take long.

All you need to know is that the January 6th Committee LIED and covered up the TRUTH and that I need YOU to stand with me NOW.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to PROUDLY stand with me and join the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo4ags2huhaqnafdc8b5ua727f3ak3j5433l72g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm4o36cjh2bs)**_

For nearly 2 years, _**as inflation skyrocketed, crime soared, the border was erased, and Joe Biden destroyed our country,**_ the American People have been lied to by the partisan witch hunt known as the **Unselect Committee on January 6th:**

**They cut out the part of my speech where I encouraged protestors to make their voices heard "PEACEFULLY and PATRIOTICALLY."

Liz Cheney deliberately omitted the part of my tweet where I told protestors to "Go HOME with LOVE and IN PEACE."

They slanderously claimed I did not respond for "187 minutes." I issued a statement urging peace and respect for law enforcement within 25 minutes of the Capitol breach.

They hid and covered up my multiple tweets and videos, which were censored by Twitter and the FBI, in which I called for law and order, and no violence.**

__You need to know that everything they've said about me is a LIE. LIE. LIE.__
** **
_**[Please stop what you're doing and contribute of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to DEFEND me on the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmirm8frmmocgmiv0pgei75l5q80uqe0t9bsmt7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm4o36cjh2bs)**_

_The REAL story is what the Committee did NOT mention in their fake trial:_

I urged the deployment of _10,000 National Guard troops_ to keep the event safe for all involved. Nancy Pelosi and the DC Mayor REFUSED.

The Committee barely even discussed the **catastrophic security failures at the Capitol** and who was responsible for them.

They did not talk about the REASON for the protest - _a rigged and stolen election._

Most importantly, the Unselect Committee did not produce a single shred of evidence that I in ANY WAY intended or wanted violence at the Capitol.

The events of January 6th were NOT an insurrection; they were a protest that tragically got out of control - and which the Left has been weaponizing ever since to censor, spy on, and persecute American citizens.

**The entire phony hoax is about taking away your speech, taking away your vote, and taking away your freedom.**

_From the day I came down the escalator,_ it has been one Witch Hunt after another: Russia, Russia, Russia; Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine; Impeachment Hoax #1, Impeachment Hoax #2; the FBI's censorship of the Laptop from Hell, the Boxes Hoax, and so many more.

**Alongside these other persecutions, the Unselect Committee will go down in history as a con job and a disgrace. **They want to stop us from taking back our Country. But as long as I have you by my side, _they will fail, and we will WIN._

There's no time to waste, Friend.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to PROUDLY stand with me and join the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpll07r9c8a5vfcc5fb241fc8026d6fmmsf00ksg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5hm4o36cjh2bs)**_

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Families are our focus in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |

| Friends, Since releasing our 2023 NH Senate Republican Legislative Agenda last week, we've **received high praise from across the state for the common sense, conservative initiatives** that we've proposed to make our great state even better! Please take a look below at our Op-Ed from the NH Union Leader describing the plan. If you agree that we need to focus on NH families in 2023, [please consider making a $5, $25 or even $100 contribution to the NH Senate Republicans here! (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTI1NDM3NTIxODMwNjE0MDQzJmM9aDF0NSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMDYzMjI5MzA4JmQ9YjVxNm4zeg==.tNMcCxy6zjlsrwcPgJSIBS3xmE7nuP4KDd4G-mKb8O0) Thank you, - Senate President Sen. Jeb Bradley and Majority Leader Sen. Sharon Carson
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Senator Jeb Bradley & Senator Sharon Carson: Families are our focus in 2023**
---
| |
---
| IN NEW HAMPSHIRE, we understand the importance of families who make up our Granite State communities, which is why our Senate Republican Caucus has made them the focus of our agenda for 2023. We’re going above and beyond simply passing a fiscally responsible budget with no new taxes — our agenda highlights initiatives that deliver results for Granite Staters. New Hampshire families work hard to earn a living, which is why Senate Republicans are committed to ensuring more of their money stays in their wallets. We will always protect our New Hampshire advantage. That means blocking direct attempts at new or increased taxes and opposing reckless spending that would force us into an income, sales, or capital gains tax in the future. We will boost our state’s competitive business climate by not imposing costly regulatory policies and increasing reciprocity agreements that enable skilled employees to come work in the Granite State. We will support further improvements on statewide broadband projects via public-private partnerships to enhance internet connectivity throughout our state. While Republican leadership has delivered smart fiscal decisions in New Hampshire, reckless decisions in Washington are hurting Granite State families across the board, especially when it comes to energy costs. We support increasing our state’s supply of both traditional and renewable energy sources including cost-effective net metering. This will help lower electric rates as New Hampshire families face economic challenges driven by Washington. We understand that education is the key to every student’s future. In past budgets, we have significantly increased funding for public schools and, revenue permitting, hope to do so again. We have also taken steps to empower New Hampshire’s students and parents to utilize the different educational options that suit the individual needs of their children. More than 2,000 New Hampshire students are taking advantage of our state’s innovative school choice program. We will continue to support allowing them to attend the schools of their choice or homeschooling. We will maintain support for public charter schools so that every child can access their optimal learning environment. We will target education aid to school districts with the greatest financial need and direct state funding for special education programs. No child’s education options should be limited because of their family’s economic status — New Hampshire Senate Republicans are ensuring opportunity for students regardless of their financial background. It’s equally important that children, students, families, and workers alike can live, work, and play without fear or concern for their safety, so we’re taking steps to protect our neighborhoods and streets. Especially in the wake of an increase in crime across our country, we’re fighting to keep New Hampshire the safest state in the U.S. Through the expansion of school education resource officers and increased funding for school safety initiatives, we’ll fight to protect our neighborhoods. Reforming our state’s bail system to prevent violent and repeat offenders from continually breaching our community’s safety is a priority, as well as ensuring law enforcement has the resources needed to preserve the security of our streets. Lack of workforce housing and increasing homelessness are serious concerns. We will address this crisis with legislation to be considered early in the legislative session. We will continue to improve our state’s mental health and substance abuse resources. By easing regulatory barriers, we’re making it easier for mental health providers to relocate to New Hampshire as well as opening a 24-bed forensic hospital to provide treatment for acute mental illness. For children most at risk to themselves and others, we will support legislation to build a secure facility to assist in the rehabilitation of youthful offenders. Adequate health care is critical for all ages and economic backgrounds, so we will continue to advocate to secure health care access for low-income families while reducing the costs of uncompensated care. We will continue to ensure funding to protect children from abuse and neglect and for families with disabled children. Protecting economic opportunity in New Hampshire is a critical issue, especially with a national recession looming due to reckless spending policies in Washington. New Hampshire’s economy has produced record surpluses that have allowed us in previous budgets to dedicate resources to mental health, substance abuse, child protection, and education while also providing significant resources to cities and towns to lower property taxes. We will continue with these prudent budgetary priorities. We know that hard-working families are critical to the success of New Hampshire which is why they are at the forefront of our 2023 Agenda. We look forward to working with our colleagues to help New Hampshire families thrive. _Senate President Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) represents Senate District 3. State Majority Leader Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry) is a U.S. Army veteran and represents District 14._

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: if I do this… I can’t do it alone. I’m serious.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I am getting pretty close to making a final decision on whether or not to run for Senate in Arizona.
#

Peter -
I am getting pretty close to making a final decision on whether or not to run for Senate in Arizona.
But here’s what I do know.
If I do this, it won’t be easy. Kyrsten Sinema has supported a lot of powerful special interests and they’ll be there to support her.
If I do this, we’ll have to raise a lot of money. Kyrsten Sinema has millions in the bank, almost all from large donations, and that will pick up.
If I do this, we’ll probably be taking on someone like Kari Lake with the support of Donald Trump at the same time.
If I do this, I can’t do it alone.
And before I announce, I need to know you’ll be with me. I need to know we’ll have the resources to run and WIN from day one. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today? The amount is not nearly as important as the number of people donating today to show they’re in if I run.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-jan23.jskq5v&refcode=em230111-1-7&t=1&akid=246%2E734936%2ExYn6h4)

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Peter, Let’s get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
The battle lines are drawn.

After a brutal election year, Republicans have won the House Majority and evicted leftist Democrat Speaker Pelosi!

That’s the good news.

The bad news is Joe Biden’s Democrat Party kept control of the Senate even after these socialist Democrats have ravaged America.

Now, it’s up to House Republicans to clean up their mess.

From soaring inflation and $31 trillion of debt to “woke” propaganda poisoning our military, America First Republicans like me are going to have to take apart the Biden-Pelosi disasters bit by bit.

**Fortunately, I’m used to taking on tough assignments.**

As the first Special Forces Green Beret to serve in Congress, you can count on me to keep up the fight until we accomplish our mission!

[**But knowing you’re still on board as a faithful member of Team Waltz would go a long way to help in the trenches.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=cea2fe6a4ee241a5a06bc655234d5d29&_e=OZB13a2Dbes0EiQ2XdRdTUTcDIIu6OtFz8mfUGZkjemcxEFt5kfYZHhCVpUvZCm79DJD91kV9Za_FJvYqr9vAzvTP0Oo5_R4QGqMb1pc75OaINPAHkNCbwCN6VflBtOMf0mUFrX0lbmwjkywWjx8abPVrRWdmafLlBI3TKZStGihZL7I4YmsDZ-IGXTth8JDNjU0XDfFRXjc_j8T49KuMPwEXXCzIb3DdIbej7o0GZdT7f3j7067A4K8-R8AbMcu6zkX7zFC2QPs-PvAHHJ411xHdx0y6rDaoZH01gPxhO7pSr7aya1sw41miT3-UxsUT5jZr8l-aK8pje_-cFlVAg%3D%3D)
---
[**JOIN TEAM WALTZ**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=cea2fe6a4ee241a5a06bc655234d5d29&_e=OZB13a2Dbes0EiQ2XdRdTUTcDIIu6OtFz8mfUGZkjemcxEFt5kfYZHhCVpUvZCm79DJD91kV9Za_FJvYqr9vAzvTP0Oo5_R4QGqMb1pc75OaINPAHkNCbwCN6VflBtOMf0mUFrX0lbmwjkywWjx8abPVrRWdmafLlBI3TKZStGi8Xn4qDVjLpxgmHMUSKCuvkshqg6j5MUWZVIvdBfu5ORsyXZQQtFfzKnE2bw5uNMOtpHRJngN8x6Wv75dJ9YzT_VoAnc9BoTQLQSp42WnzFEB0be_z-1LAlRv54Vnin2YmdsGCxwW8Ps9h5SHvU6Pl4elfjvar0ZMr55AOddXZzw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, there’s no doubt I’m going to have my work cut out for me in the challenging days and months ahead.

Joe Biden and his leftist regime have crippled our economy, driven up inflation with reckless spending, and left our southern border wide open to illegal aliens, drug traffickers, and even terrorists!

While Communist China is building its military, the Biden regime is poisoning ours with radical “woke” ideology. I’m fighting back with the tenacity I honed as a Special Forces Green Beret and I truly need you on my team.

We must right this ship immediately, and I’m just the Special Forces Operator to get the job done.

For the next 24 hours ONLY, we’ve activated a 3X CONTRIBUTION MATCH so we can get to work building a rock-solid campaign while I’m working hard to rebuild our military strength.

[**Please pitch in whatever you can to MAXIMIZE your contribution and help protect the future of America.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=cea2fe6a4ee241a5a06bc655234d5d29&_e=OZB13a2Dbes0EiQ2XdRdTUTcDIIu6OtFz8mfUGZkjemcxEFt5kfYZHhCVpUvZCm79DJD91kV9Za_FJvYqr9vAzvTP0Oo5_R4QGqMb1pc75OaINPAHkNCbwCN6VflBtOMf0mUFrX0lbmwjkywWjx8abPVrRWdmafLlBI3TKZStGhFWTOinwAo5h1fFXXEJw0fNf12UIQoPDKXv8kmp67HkuiqBU5jW7Yuzn8QdyizAHXAc3VXNffFzc9jC7Vy6rIUHn-N19jGXAhlB4FS0ch822fYF1K4cvqCy5gvMO172moJ1ih-emndRAYOYzEfNO7Ult4NvZT86GaYu9rcU2sECw%3D%3D)
