clean_body: | | | Peter, The battle lines are drawn. After a brutal election year, Republicans have won the House Majority and evicted leftist Democrat Speaker Pelosi! That’s the good news. The bad news is Joe Biden’s Democrat Party kept control of the Senate even after these socialist Democrats have ravaged America. Now, it’s up to House Republicans to clean up their mess. From soaring inflation and $31 trillion of debt to “woke” propaganda poisoning our military, America First Republicans like me are going to have to take apart the Biden-Pelosi disasters bit by bit. Fortunately, I’m used to taking on tough assignments. As the first Special Forces Green Beret to serve in Congress, you can count on me to keep up the fight until we accomplish our mission! Peter, there’s no doubt I’m going to have my work cut out for me in the challenging days and months ahead. Joe Biden and his leftist regime have crippled our economy, driven up inflation with reckless spending, and left our southern border wide open to illegal aliens, drug traffickers, and even terrorists! While Communist China is building its military, the Biden regime is poisoning ours with radical “woke” ideology. I’m fighting back with the tenacity I honed as a Special Forces Green Beret and I truly need you on my team. We must right this ship immediately, and I’m just the Special Forces Operator to get the job done. For the next 24 hours ONLY, we’ve activated a 3X CONTRIBUTION MATCH so we can get to work building a rock-solid campaign while I’m working hard to rebuild our military strength. - | | In Service, Col. name: United Rural Democrats HQ
subject: Did you hear what happened in Belvidere, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
This isn't new for rural communities across the country | | | Hi Peter, **In case you didn't hear the**[**news**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbRqlpsbvu9lwzWPGGxibzz8XTjTZkeWeGyNeZbwRHZh_LenSxC4BCtM5fXJkm20yx_putKKiCCZkvUxguzPXY-UtgQM-Fvt86__m2Nd88rH_Zj61Ol4uBJX-989vb5vp3IfDWDs2qHmWUtkgfr162o-fQB-3eDEVlxD_DG_YcuKs-J78y8kpQbBkCIlTb9xwimbN1y2le9rmPscE_ZFyOXR8zzG29zuHwRdxIyERb1RuouXaGzQFFINCGQZSd_dgw-VSpjvXo2SYWLAyD52CEuWs0wUhTy93_KVMdFy1mb3bn0E4mRFvJnA6VaJTuCM-WClgcL9r7Zg1h_rtYODHZ6FjolJ4BevPhIz00ts9Zeo5JLpZiVw6SmyamUzZqNtuKk9--srHvCni_Gt_Ow0wxAc/3sr/FK5OgshLRm6U6N1VoxWLAg/h0/VP38yX0XNt2T08jtjax78LQcFK_aulUu-XXo5gIsMXA)**, a Jeep plant closed in Belvidere, Illinois, putting 1,350 hard working Americans out of a job.** The town of Belvidere sits about an hour northwest of Chicago, and has relied on auto assembly plants for jobs since the 1960s. What was once a plant that produced 190,000 Jeep Cherokees a year, employing about 5,000 people, now produced just around 20,000 in 2022. Auto manufacturer Stellantis recently announced that the plant would be shutting down "indefinitely" in February 2023. The loss of a manufacturing plant is devastating, especially in rural areas. Those 1,350 workers have families, support small businesses, and can contribute to the community because of a steady job. **Without that security, their livelihoods, and the wellbeing of everyone in the town, is in danger.** This theme of shuttering manufacturing plants is a common thread across rural areas throughout the past few decades. It's also why we need political leaders who understand the enormous impact that these plants have on towns, and the need to make rural economies more resilient and ripe for job growth. That's why we support rural Democrats who understand the need for labor protection, investments in manufacturing competitiveness, skills training for the jobs of the future, affordable education, and support programs for those who are out of work. ****[**We need your help to save towns like Belvidere, Peter. Will you chip in $5 or more to make sure that we elect leaders who can protect rural communities and jobs?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc0zZXQuP5iaFLRM2K0eGWMvC5UFzwr70XHI3ryMl9qh5UnslCjz6tTB-_9swtT-gBm4Gae_z05rSzdMXfQvusmzmcDjLDlEZbV_t14RkA9kbdy4XUzpPTbpxeBbzF5zaely3f20b8h5YKPASi4hJgyR41bxrkIJEjxzgaJ26fD1auLNuiVuF6AYgVENmR7gGm8WRb0fj8bjmAoXwlpsmpfCiHmmHJEEapv0qxzQHaeA5Nx93ynCvXoBI6wXKN6CTs8kFIfGlmP4QnZHpyCReXvkY6qzDBs9WjZbdkiVvkIfianR0jCY3ILjpCUYCA-UH0npOiO26eO-lLvINnz5HUjVgnhZUFBHXgznzCdnyJgXnffSy0TZr4hLVN1qxXkrw6P2iMg63jy2zEscTqGbRk4uLfWL_78GOI9z9-o22-trE/3sr/FK5OgshLRm6U6N1VoxWLAg/h1/M4ux1pUf4KprepN41HxTECAdCwbFyK1In5QgYKgtEts) **[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcN0EFX3GV82frN1k8RZrvn-TXeF90jFH1Omy8imb-VuyzOfPVvYOzTrAHbA91NfOj2RTPdnxiyCwZR3tZY5N2do25BsIYun7B0AJ-H4N7fYMG75APe58nwKYica1Voz9MgWpkdhPCVt2_yBREitkPav-q2We2tOiNYY2436rtaLe2syBMsOK20J7KzA4424CeTaiGAC-i--RUWUzGq32PLM5NoxZqy2fk33QDJ9nbL1XMVYStxVijaMHk78sQVbv5WoHI3w3qNWA7iRP_J1LDuAoERAX8tmnT9T4bGN8fPur-P12cMkB9Mo-IReaU6zS3Uis-xx01lDMlhp1PB4bC6R0c8haII_qoaOO7MPcwG2MJkdJtzfvA7ERziPbOUpb6fYctobsxqO3sdE1TGOgeVg/3sr/FK5OgshLRm6U6N1VoxWLAg/h2/B-tPkueORhz07qkucueUlojXdWQjd2NtOsnXDaKWbHg)** Thank you for your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ

clean_body: This isn't new for rural communities across the country | | | Hi Peter, In case you didn't hear the, a Jeep plant closed in Belvidere, Illinois, putting 1,350 hard working Americans out of a job. The town of Belvidere sits about an hour northwest of Chicago, and has relied on auto assembly plants for jobs since the 1960s. What was once a plant that produced 190,000 Jeep Cherokees a year, employing about 5,000 people, now produced just around 20,000 in 2022. Auto manufacturer Stellantis recently announced that the plant would be shutting down "indefinitely" in February 2023. The loss of a manufacturing plant is devastating, especially in rural areas. Those 1,350 workers have families, support small businesses, and can contribute to the community because of a steady job. Without that security, their livelihoods, and the wellbeing of everyone in the town, is in danger. This theme of shuttering manufacturing plants is a common thread across rural areas throughout the past few decades. It's also why we need political leaders who understand the enormous impact that these plants have on towns, and the need to make rural economies more resilient and ripe for job growth. That's why we support rural Democrats who understand the need for labor protection, investments in manufacturing competitiveness, skills training for the jobs of the future, affordable education, and support programs for those who are out of work. ** Thank you for your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

Friend, I've been in politics for a LONG time, and I thought I'd seen everything under the sun – _but boy, was I WRONG_.

**The sh*t the GOP comes up with is cuckoo! **

Republicans will do ANYTHING to gain power and enact their destructive agenda – even if it means attacking our country and their own party. It took 15 votes to confirm the leader of their own party!
**And just consider the insanity being proposed by the GOP: **
* **A national ban on abortion **and the end of reproductive freedom in America.

* **Cuts to Social Security, Medicare **and other programs American families rely on.

* Stripping back voting rights and undermining faith in our elections – with the ultimate goal of **destroying our democracy for their political gain.**

I won't mince words. The GOP we know today is not just wrong, problematic, or foolish. _It is_ __ _ dangerous_.**And for that, every member of the GOP must be held accountable.**

That's why I work with American Bridge. Our mission is to hold Republicans, including Donald Trump and his allies, accountable by keeping track of the dangerous, destructive things Republicans say and do and to make sure voters don't forget it.

name: Andrew Wynne
subject: Joe Biden’s Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
| | | Peter, President Trump and Senate Republicans worked tirelessly to secure our judicial system with fair-minded Conservative judges. **Joe Biden is now threatening all that progress...**
---
[**HELP US STOP BIDEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190487:JbnEE-GNN:m:1:3334294963:9998FA907236F9E6A72FB96A0D62BEE5:r)
---
| | Biden and the rest of the far-left are planning a takeover of America's institutions. They want the full power of the U.S. government's executive, legislative, and judicial branches. And the scary thing is, _they're getting closer to accomplishing their goal._ **_[DON'T LET THEM WIN>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190487:JbnEE-GNN:m:1:3334294963:9998FA907236F9E6A72FB96A0D62BEE5:r)_** Democrats have the White House and the Senate, and they're starting to take over the courts...
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190487:JbnEE-GNN:m:1:3334294963:9998FA907236F9E6A72FB96A0D62BEE5:r)
---
**President Trump 's efforts to secure our courts WORKED to fight back against the Left. That's why Joe Biden is racing to outpace President Trump's record-setting number of district court judge appointments.** And he isn't slowing down... it's clear that he's targeting our courts. With control of the White House and Senate, Democrats can continue to appoint radical woke judges at rapid rates \- so we have to fight for our courts harder than ever.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190487:JbnEE-GNN:m:1:3334294963:9998FA907236F9E6A72FB96A0D62BEE5:r)

We **can** take on the radical left. We **can** unite voters across the political spectrum to save America's courts. **But we can't do it without you.** **With your help, we can protect Trump's conservative judicial legacy and keep our courts fair and free.**
---
[**RUSH A DONATION******](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190487:JbnEE-GNN:m:1:3334294963:9998FA907236F9E6A72FB96A0D62BEE5:r)

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Demand Facebook keep Trump's ban in place!
body:
| | | | |

| | | [Tell Facebook: "Don’t end Trump's ban" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73a7e064-7067-481d-8d2b-361063de81a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | After repeatedly violating Facebook's own rules, and using his account to incite violence and insurrection, Donald Trump was banned for two years in 2021. **But that two years has just ended** , and Facebook says it will announce "in coming weeks" whether Trump will be reinstated. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook "Don't end Trump's ban."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f991d01-74b7-47f4-b3c5-02464cb22dca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is an ongoing threat to our democracy, and Facebook should not give him a megaphone to spew his hatred and violent threats. Facebook has the right — and the responsibility — to keep the ban, and as a matter of public safety, it needs to do so. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook "Don't end Trump's ban."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39ecdf47-68b0-4e30-9d9f-57e177e3f11d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Want to guarantee that the vacancy on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court will be filled by a Democrat? That can happen, if these two Democratic judges win the upcoming primary.
body:
Could 2024’s presidential race be affected?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta46ededc-3cb9-4af8-95e8-810e1c806236/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important election of 2023 might well happen on February 21st, in Wisconsin._** _In one of the most important swing states, Wisconsin, there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court. This will determine the balance of this court, as a 4-3 right wing majority right now can be replaced with a 4-3 progressive majority._ **__If_ we win, we can and will stop voter suppression and state legislative shenanigans to steal the election for Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis. _**_If we lose, they will have an opportunity to put away Wisconsin for a democracy-destroying Republican, even if they lack the votes. _**_It is truly scary what they can do if they control the court._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03854561-9e4c-4e07-9448-052e87d744e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **__With a right winger leaving the Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat to the seat. __**_There is an open primary with two Democrats and two Republicans running. If we ensure both Democrats run first and second in February, we will guarantee one wins the April general election. At the very least, we must ensure both Republicans don't win February 18th, shutting us out of the general._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdcf56b00-39d6-4af9-97ca-c0fceefd3638/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Therefore, we have to fund both progressive candidates, Dane County Judge Everett Mitchell & Milwaukee County Judge Janet Protasiewicz_** _, as the secretive authoritarian Federalist Society dumps in cash to try and win control of this court, as they just did in Ohio and North Carolina. We absolutely CANNOT allow that to happen._ [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75912414-3bf7-44aa-9241-da8da3c02da1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America._** Cliff
---

|
---

---
|

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27514321-f888-467f-99ee-4c121e6fc11f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Katie Porter for California HQ
subject: Will you be one of Katie’s first endorsers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need your support today.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)
Derek,
It’s official: Katie Porter is running to represent California in the U.S. Senate!
**[Can you add your name to personally endorse Katie and become one of our campaign’s first official supporters? We want you on our team.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF11_1_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=9&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)**
**[Endorse Katie ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF11_1_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=10&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)**
Katie is running for Senate to continue the work she’s always done, taking on powerful special interests, lowering costs for families, and securing a sustainable future for future generations.
**She’s one of the few Members of Congress who rejects corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, and she’s leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.**
With Democrats having just a single-seat majority in the Senate, we need a warrior willing to fight for working people and families in Washington. **Katie Porter is that warrior, Derek.**
From securing free COVID tests for all Americans, to showing how corporate profits have driven inflation and introducing legislation to actually hold them accountable, Katie and her whiteboard have taken on our nation’s most powerful. A single-parent of three kids, Katie believes “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough.
Katie Porter will fight for _all_ of us in the Senate. And we’re just getting started.
**[We need your support to build a better California and a better country, Derek. Please add your name today to become one of our first official supporters and personally endorse Katie Porter for Senate.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF11_1_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=11&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)**
**[Endorse Katie ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF11_1_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=12&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)**
Thank you for your support,
Katie Porter for California HQ

**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF11_1_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=13&refcode2=15639_3422442_Vda57M&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=14&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=15639%2E3422442%2EVda57M)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
clean_body: We need your support today. Derek, It’s official: Katie Porter is running to represent California in the U.S. Senate! Katie is running for Senate to continue the work she’s always done, taking on powerful special interests, lowering costs for families, and securing a sustainable future for future generations. She’s one of the few Members of Congress who rejects corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, and she’s leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. With Democrats having just a single-seat majority in the Senate, we need a warrior willing to fight for working people and families in Washington. Katie Porter is that warrior, Derek. From securing free COVID tests for all Americans, to showing how corporate profits have driven inflation and introducing legislation to actually hold them accountable, Katie and her whiteboard have taken on our nation’s most powerful. A single-parent of three kids, Katie believes “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough. Katie Porter will fight for all of us in the Senate. And we’re just getting started. Thank you for your support, Katie Porter for California HQ

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Mike Pence
subject: Joe Biden can’t deny this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc |
body:
We can solve this crisis. All it takes is... | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_t=Dx29gyq4ZR2T1qv_yKgzULqTUxVQGDihWX49C-MN-LxVBWMaj1sKJTWsJMwuYAb9octK9wb1dLpvzao4Ofami6-iTZp1V6Q303emeDfoBtg%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_e=RRR3-nHcn82eBBzLyv6Sfld47-Q92AVgJRFZSlhPWff1SCGCzIdF3pvjx4Vnm6rmRnufmJ5WXKDYfsqfPyGjo0dunJ_jivF_7NGYBOoSaoL-M6u56TXlKeSM74VuhxOy4zGmpNVPMeMyMYN65p0lA4GyJ5eGz3nEFv4CPtCk5pjHe8_e7Ny_TTkhJnyiobl8eygowq0EvIN3ZF-F1QTSrFkSNEshqRIWbhyMu81FAYZd6I_4t2Ie8Km6G0rMWut1NEB3CVpHI9puHAy1kJ6LIGEkiT92-dLJUXGTy-GNLr1-jZPEn3qWWM2cZHpEb9nsj5a-_Tf4hhnqHdeRfS7zOsBk15fY0Ms48QfONMUEPOwvXwR3z-s3hVX7MF_gm1uD)
---
| | Peter,
President Biden inherited the _most secure border_ in American history, thanks to the Trump-Pence Administration. Then, in Biden’s first 100 days, he took _more than 90 executive actions_ that encouraged illegal immigration, opening the floodgates like never before. **While the border crisis ran rampant over the last two years, President Biden turned a blind eye, acting as though no problem existed.** _And he_ __just now__ _decided to finally visit the southern border and see the crisis he spearheaded. _
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_e=RRR3-nHcn82eBBzLyv6Sfld47-Q92AVgJRFZSlhPWff1SCGCzIdF3pvjx4Vnm6rmRnufmJ5WXKDYfsqfPyGjo0dunJ_jivF_7NGYBOoSaoL-M6u56TXlKeSM74VuhxOy4zGmpNVPMeMyMYN65p0lA4GyJ5eGz3nEFv4CPtCk5pjHe8_e7Ny_TTkhJnyiobl8eygowq0EvIN3ZF-F1QTSrFkSNEshqRIWbhyMu81FAYagfoL5lbEIoRyvMEoZ5usuE6Q4u2zizE2jJq0aEdw3YM3GHUAYczcBB1w8FiVjzLKLngwvwfo8Fo9JfveQzqgzQbrlENP7mQtjeMUuYctKcn5ZXU59j9Mf1QZV5rNXufJ_m98d8eBIa1yhoGUgJdkm)
---
The numbers don’t lie, Peter. _**Our southern border is a crisis of truly epic proportions.**_ It is a crisis that is costing lives and incalculable human suffering in every state in America. It is a crisis that is growing worse by the day. _But it is also a crisis that President Biden can end in a heartbeat if he simply had the courage. _
---
[**END THE BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_e=RRR3-nHcn82eBBzLyv6Sfld47-Q92AVgJRFZSlhPWff1SCGCzIdF3pvjx4Vnm6rmRnufmJ5WXKDYfsqfPyGjo0dunJ_jivF_7NGYBOoSaoL-M6u56TXlKeSM74VuhxOy4zGmpNVPMeMyMYN65p0lA4GyJ5eGz3nEFv4CPtCk5pjHe8_e7Ny_TTkhJnyiobl8eygowq0EvIN3ZF-F1QTSrFkSNEshqRIWbhyMu81FAYbTuDLl5wMtPX7_Ydoo-YWvRqwyu82ksPNWeHvgHiilpQlorHbuAI5wIT90u6zOsoWPY5N2iIYKN3k-LUO68eK7kuM8XBLO6KFKIhy3-RqCdSJA5jB7ccTY2lFvTLYhq-D9BuQTLFJZko_ZUB-YwCju)
---
I know that our leaders can once again secure our border and end the crisis of immigration. I know because that’s exactly what we achieved in four short years under the Trump-Pence administration. All it takes is the will to do so. _[**SECURE THE BORDER NOW >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_e=RRR3-nHcn82eBBzLyv6Sfld47-Q92AVgJRFZSlhPWff1SCGCzIdF3pvjx4Vnm6rmRnufmJ5WXKDYfsqfPyGjo0dunJ_jivF_7NGYBOoSaoL-M6u56TXlKeSM74VuhxOy4zGmpNVPMeMyMYN65p0lA4GyJ5eGz3nEFv4CPtCk5pjHe8_e7Ny_TTkhJnyiobl8eygowq0EvIN3ZF-F1QTSrFkSNEshqRIWbhyMu81FAYYh2qSTVL1ifeuiuvoDQSX6NMB4hC0rv0A02sc0M9P23aHkcVcM3Wi6k7Vw33IMpRn6vsTZ3ovEn-0a2rgu4_43G3PZDgZXO9zbLXdGJGlbN3L9YBT6tJ4qxmeptTBjXZf5pf6h4PAY_P1ku7iAL9g2)_ If Democrats end their obstruction, we can secure our border, protect our communities and end this border crisis once and for all. Peter, it’s up to us to light a fire under our leaders until they tackle this crisis. At Advancing American Freedom, that’s EXACTLY what we are doing. **We’re using our resources to recruit activists committed to holding our leaders accountable, and our Freedom Agenda lays out the policies that’ll end this crisis once and for all.** _[**Stand with AAF, help execute these plans, and secure our border once again. >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03f3e5b4da38425e9d83446ffd49ce23&_e=RRR3-nHcn82eBBzLyv6Sfld47-Q92AVgJRFZSlhPWff1SCGCzIdF3pvjx4Vnm6rmRnufmJ5WXKDYfsqfPyGjo0dunJ_jivF_7NGYBOoSaoL-M6u56TXlKeSM74VuhxOy4zGmpNVPMeMyMYN65p0lA4GyJ5eGz3nEFv4CPtCk5pjHe8_e7Ny_TTkhJnyiobl8eygowq0EvIN3ZF-F1QTSrFkSNEshqRIWbhyMu81FAYaNd6rTqF8E2xfoYnaSLpPnnI8AjrOQnfkDihovWks0DgXZDN5WGwztOHnF8JXn2EHYhOooaWx1I37elbIRz5pAw4TzqHMUMoHKtX2s66MQ8fe1ClkFPPEt4dEGIqsGAb1aKH3zfqKE6m14EbAbOl1O)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132732?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The 2023 Legislative Session has begun!** It's been a little over a week since the state legislature gaveled in, and hundreds of bills have already been dropped in both chambers.

**As I oversee MCPP's legislative affairs, I will be giving weekly updates to keep you all informed on governmental news, policies we want to highlight - both good and bad - and the status of our agenda throughout the session. **
---
|
---
| Candidates began qualifying to run for the 2023 elections beginning last week. Candidates have until the end of the month to qualify, but many incumbents have already done so.

Gov. Tate Reeves and Lt. Gov Delbert Hosemann will be seeking their respective positions for a second term. House Speaker Philip Gunn will not be running for reelection, but Speaker Pro Tem Jason White plans to run again, stating if elected as the new Speaker in 2024, he would gladly accept the role.
---
|
---
| While most bills that have been dropped have not yet been discussed in committee, here are a few that have been introduced so far that we would like to highlight.

**THE GOOD**
**\- HB 31 from Rep. Timmy Ladner provides penalties for knowingly making false accusations of a person committing a crime.** This could help prevent misguided harm that could negatively impact reputations of the accused.
**\- HB 38 introduced by Rep. Henry Zuber requires new proposed agency rules to be approved by the state auditor.** This would allow for more transparency in agency spending.
**\- HB 370 from Rep. Shanda Yates allows for a municipal recall.** If members of a municipality feel a mayor or local elected official is not performing to the best of their abilities, they can call for the removal of a said official with a petition of signatures.

**THE BAD
\- HB 54 by Orlando Paden and both HB 80 and HB 99 by Oscar Denton infringe on our second amendment rights.** These bills restrain certain Mississippians from purchasing firearms, an act that goes against our Constitution.
**\- HB 74 from Charles Young requires that all Mississippians ages 12 or older must carry photo identification with them at all times, and those found without an ID will be fined.** While one must have a driver's license to operate a motor vehicle, simply existing does not constitute for means of providing identification.

**THE INTERESTING
\- HB 45 from Gene Newman requires trash pickup if someone is found littering as a means of punishment.** Along with easily paying a fine, offenders would have to learn from their mistakes by actually reversing their crime.
**\- HB 133 by Bryant Clark gives two or more municipalities the authority to create a joint police force amongst one another.** While logistically I am not sure if this would be very successful, the concept is intriguing.
---
|
---
| We are currently working with various lawmakers to see our plans put into action. **A full list of MCPP's goals for the legislative session can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=54def59af6&e=5703353baa). **

**So far a few bills have already been introduced that support our agenda, with more to come:
\- HB 370 which constitutes a municipal recall, as mentioned above, is a topic MCPP has been a consistent advocate for. **
**\- HB 9 from Rep. Lee Yancey authorizes pharmacists to test and treat particular minor health conditions.** MCPP believes in changing the state's healthcare system for the better, and we support giving pharmacists more jurisdiction.
**\- HB 10, also from Rep. Yancey, removes regulations and Certificate of Need requirements for certain medical facilities.** While we support the overall removal of CON laws in the state, this is a great first step in repealing an outdated federal mandate that negatively impacts the quality of healthcare.

With a new year, comes new ideas, and MCPP is excited to promote _conservative_ ideas over the next few months. We hope you'll follow us on this journey as we work toward creating positive change for our dear Mississippi.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a875e03ffc&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1dd5014d2c&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b87f3a079f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b87f3a079f).

body:

clean_body: We need your input >> | Hi Peter, Even though Republicans took back the House, November was not the Red Wave we hoped for. Republicans didn't perform well enough, and we want to hear from you: | - Many thanks for your input. We will keep you informed about our efforts moving forward as we reshape the party. Sincerely, GOP Alerts Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: RE: humbly asking, Peter

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8TTqNQ5BZdbD3BQmm6Oaj2oTiMuMiQD6qB5R07WrcrXg8Q0EaO0P_kP4QyADCk1Cv5HT-fFPdh7SFh_wzXQaHN-KNPbfO8Vk9eNZ6QR3aI_7luiLTaT3sL7SSIcbg9RfpzXiXLIJ9J-JpCQKtjZNzYIaXclhSVe6B1YHFUsYeApruzf5v_DwdtjdSSYhekV85COzRMSwxOy1Z_oA-bQH1PFoshoAooSitc6o-Z3TInDotpV-1GOs6LDy7ptE8PtdE5w08qbvD3UKCvy1YOi5ClYpVhERWPcX4wxW3lV_uOl_RI9DEgzhDFSiZP3oxtDa-g/3sr/xK7ZFS4ESwW_lzVmtR3T5A/h0/HoSf4wb6WQu86ulpSjql6O7N8QFsKmMkoRjk1OkdFg8) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAnYabYyGIX0iAfcikzvy_xv-xxPxSmgqXtRij6F8j6N29J_gbNCljJwxVQ38UegS4l0C4mdmeDlZ2TnWxHj1rUY9AjGJIs0_M-tkJbDgdnbShgLFzikENlXKtsWlD_CXUSm9poThmQMrswO-1rLlHYOzYrrG5-vm6cxkjrEJoUYWWmoos0hSeL4oJt9AoRIWsAkgCe-o5WlX-LldnER9tzaXepQtT3t7vfVZmWBFzN5ugGKq3Hsnnb2H31Qv9zOB0CS25Ydlu3qIK-SN9Z2ep1DugOLrmZL_5GgJSoGzp0jaJO5TTthUrOM7TYnWTTU4w/3sr/xK7ZFS4ESwW_lzVmtR3T5A/h1/n2KL5VWFjop01dUJuG3ms1Hgwud8McojdnTrN0ILgp0) Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader.

Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family.

**But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us.**

[After Republicans’ historically dysfunctional start, everyone will be watching to see what kind of fundraising numbers Democrats post. The support you show in my first week as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. I’m asking: Will you split $10 between my campaign and The Collective PAC to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats? >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAnYabYyGIX0iAfcikzvy_xv-xxPxSmgqXtRij6F8j6N29J_gbNCljJwxVQ38UegS4l0C4mdmeDlZ2TnWxHj1rUafDVobfhmo39ajvmYl4bP-e3kpVRI24aYHXGW1AbmqGwun0iSa5N4ImYoUvXg930i3-ij6frcp36P3aPL6ZwI-nJeOc5vpz2olCwMX1rueuxhIziOI3hwyYtyS4a22yTiyhwhm5WBixVAL5_llHpEZvNTvvYutSGTocOnoTgj5OFovIDRvCBGiKnBgdNUuw_euBZeWg3fT8iM3wUfnx8C_wur5Muu51isRPP3r3Qu3R/3sr/xK7ZFS4ESwW_lzVmtR3T5A/h2/m7QORd2lA8CSCtAUz3uGSVWZFdi6URI2FrFX532RCeg)

Here’s the deal:

Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority.

**_We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong, Peter._**

Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year.

[Can I count on you to step up in this defining moment? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAnYabYyGIX0iAfcikzvy_xv-xxPxSmgqXtRij6F8j6N29J_gbNCljJwxVQ38UegS4l0C4mdmeDlZ2TnWxHj1rUTxUkRfh7RlKNqrIdG0y7YsoH44DXHFYA-GGSmLZOAtPZefiLcYktkOoCMnAf91YLVMt4aIGnd2joKrKQwC2G5R4SppE8-sT9cZMIL2xp7Mu-wlJ4moksKQX8JU12TbeuT3pTNiqKJ0wSwstLoEZYIXgNObEq2E9c3vDIamU2hATAmRawqBmcByMJnfLqiQ94Em6Fnhzfrrcutf5ClQQ48fMX6pEpf2th1zy6xhPc-Zl/3sr/xK7ZFS4ESwW_lzVmtR3T5A/h3/4i4nIBxC1pzehx5ETMmdbu8DwktvkjQQJXIQo5x3yWY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Hakeem Jeffries and The Collective PAC.

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl3j483pij703hmrl3lrfd9ve44pf4r1qvkmt7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm0o31c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdk3h923n6qv2jte6c5mq5avv8kpt1d61t9uldq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm0o31c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2l9sjrd3bqcni34e73r6as7enj05dia6jdsafj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm0o31c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zvm9pcn1nol24cfgie5e4bsijco6gi0ni0q612t0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl61cuqq9ge9jjd42t8nhtt42fo3ts2fdgtbqpeg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpgmeo30c5ge49fg)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7713%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=XHUzIn4e4i7%2flp511pGrGQ&sysid=1)
Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91160%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MEsSeEuqRz%2bo%2b5mTF7JKhQ&sysid=1)
|
---

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tDlCLRVlK8CvqPWCtgmGgQ&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SYQVDv5vVtvUG9SssttuNg&sysid=1) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more ...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | | Dear Patriot, I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends. At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again. You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building. Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway. Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba! Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more ...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. subject: [BREAKING] re: Open Senate Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A battleground seat is about to be vacated.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190880:6Ay2V-GNg:m:1:3331421248:4B4E0180D6733ACB32C3EF076788E4EA:r)
---
Peter,
---
As the new Chairman of the NRSC, I couldn't have asked for better news to kick off our fight to flip the Senate back into conservative hands.
---
_Our map of open pickups in 2024 just grew by 1 more seat with Democrat Debbie Stabenow announcing she will not seek reelection in the critical battleground state of Michigan._
---
On the heels of this news, Kamala knows her 51-seat majority is in dire straits.
---
**And remember, if we FIRE Joe Biden next year, all we need is 1 SEAT to take back the Senate.**
---
_Which is why I 've already instructed the Committee to launch our official Blue to Red Battleground Fund to build the foundation for winning seats like this brand-new pickup opportunity._
---
[**Please make a contribution to Senate conservatives ' Blue to Red Battleground Fund so that we can build an immediate foundation for victory in Michigan's soon to be VACANT SEAT - 1,000% IMPACT active for the Fund's first 30 minutes. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190880:6Ay2V-GNg:m:1:3331421248:4B4E0180D6733ACB32C3EF076788E4EA:r)

With so much at stake, we simply can't let this golden opportunity in Michigan go to waste.

_Over the last 2 years in the 50-50 Senate, Kamala Harris broke the all-time record for casting the most tie-breaking votes in not only a single day, but an _ENTIRE_ _YEAR_ as well._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklrqal85c2p573hjappjcnovf4qkechd0bh54q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs)
|
---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8dnu498ocla03v43njnsr05vtsr2t3tli4jsdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hbfl8k5rfkmvko61107ffuqmfs184qafq4bq3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpr83hp315hcb14plrud2dbgjnm984aap6lqotmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv9p6p6cvvi8brmd096h04dp7uhpu98tqscs104g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znss71vu5jm6phat89s30b8uf9bias7hhk9n944o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm8ob2cph2bs)

body:
[Official Survey Enclosed]

| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190700:6U5hV-GNO:m:1:3334294963:ABBC453E28D231A1EA632112212C4690:r) [**BREAKING NEWS: Gov. DeSantis has even more Republican support as he approaches 2nd term**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190699:6U5hV-GNO:m:1:3334294963:ABBC453E28D231A1EA632112212C4690:r) Dear Peter, We hope this email finds you well. We are reaching out today with an urgent request to participate in an **[official Republican survey regarding Governor Ron DeSantis](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190698:6U5hV-GNO:m:1:3334294963:ABBC453E28D231A1EA632112212C4690:r) in the State of Florida.** As you may know, [Governor DeSantis was recently re-elected in a landslide victory.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190697:6U5hV-GNO:m:1:3334294963:ABBC453E28D231A1EA632112212C4690:r) As a member of the Republican party, we value your opinion and want to know if you support Governor DeSantis in his role as the leader of Florida. Your response to this survey is CRITICAL, as it will represent the views of all Republicans from your community. **[We ask that you please take a few minutes to click the link below and complete the survey by 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62190696:6U5hV-GNO:m:1:3334294963:ABBC453E28D231A1EA632112212C4690:r)** Your feedback is crucial to our efforts to understand the views of our party and to ensure that we are representing the interests of our members. |

body:
Here’s a quick preview of the work we have ahead of us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57215896/387188343/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230111SwearingIn_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlOTZiOS1mYzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32h1rqNsoaA_LW_riyYcuxxtLbTqEmdguMRNr4HhEaY=) Peter,

Just last week, I was sworn into my first full term in Congress and I’m ready to continue building on 2022’s success as we head into the new year.

Despite being in the minority, **Democrats will continue to push the president’s agenda** _and remain focused on the implementation of historic investments around the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the CHIPS Act, and the Inflation Reduction Act._

I’ve already started the work to find common ground and build coalitions for success. I know there will be many opportunities to work together and pass bipartisan legislation to deliver for the people.

[**_With 2023 and my first full term in Congress underway, I need the full support of the team that’s got me this far. To stay engaged with the people, my team needs the resources to continue working throughout our community. That’s why I’m asking you, Peter, will you chip in $5 to kick off my first full term in Congress and ensure my team can continue delivering?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57215912/387188346/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230111SwearingIn_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlOTZiOS1mYzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32h1rqNsoaA_LW_riyYcuxxtLbTqEmdguMRNr4HhEaY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57215917/387188364/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230111SwearingIn_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlOTZiOS1mYzkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32h1rqNsoaA_LW_riyYcuxxtLbTqEmdguMRNr4HhEaY=)**

subject: Governor Hogan's Farewell
body:
| | | It was a bittersweet farewell, friend.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=34fa66be395c41ce979b37b44e66158c&_e=cCQY5_FSvfPM_Kc6q2AcgNDztHVZlPE95RxT0Ld4uOTIOoJeLdEprD7gQhlryt5UK1wgUNTGCsaazQqOZLYom200on8SL1Pr3uF9r54nTxI1_nqAgxECQFPqZerxC1xt7W6bZmPjKIO_MrYzfhUYwf-n7rtgeg40m7rM8AqoCFOR1rX3hnQubTZCCD6AOBkYy44IPsg1TMn4DN1J-FfYzioX5rpy8E6tZ-XbNg5yFaAa4HFhNC8XTnEcYQBxpKMxL7fSeOVPoMC499ATVekY6Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Governor Larry Hogan gave his farewell address to Maryland yesterday and in it, showed his deep love, admiration, and commitment to the people he served. As a Republican Governor in a deep-blue state, Governor Hogan said he's proud of his accomplishments and the bipartisan work done during his time in office like the $4 billion in tax, toll, and fee relief for small businesses, families, and senior citizens. He also helped usher through meaningful legislation to rebuild Maryland's aging infrastructure, navigated the state through the Covid-19 pandemic, kept law and order during the Baltimore riots in 2015, and showed the country how to get things done by working together and focusing on the issues that matter. _**"I vowed that day that the politics that have divided our nation need not divide our state. I'm proud to say that we kept that promise. Together, we lived up to Maryland's heritage as a state of middle temperament." **_ Governor Hogan never strayed from his promise to work to unite the leadership in Maryland and ensure that the government work _**FOR**_ the people... and he, along with _**An America United**_ , will continue to fight for a better way forward across the country. [_**But we need you on board if we hope to continue this important work. Please contribute $8 for 8 years of successful, common sense leadership and help An America United and Larry Hogan work to get things done.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=34fa66be395c41ce979b37b44e66158c&_e=cCQY5_FSvfPM_Kc6q2AcgNDztHVZlPE95RxT0Ld4uOTIOoJeLdEprD7gQhlryt5UK1wgUNTGCsaazQqOZLYom200on8SL1Pr3uF9r54nTxI1_nqAgxECQFPqZerxC1xtjNxfb2PkM8a137fVSbPt5yVHzGqG-hJM1cWqLLWNJBWGCLNe6JzyzB3sTlP3_1X59AlGF9_NJtOtA0bfOyEmzDTIl9OuXjyC-jbW1A9Mr1NMdQkY6YxDExcpkZAi7RAekA78nE9BSwbmJ2pgJ1pqXw%3D%3D) Thank you, _**Team An America United**_

Friend,

Joe Biden went on national television to announce mass amnesty for an additional 30,000 new illegal immigrants each and every month, which will worsen the Border Crisis that HE CAUSED.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5if0842c3e5h1fhgm5diff4teriam37a30d4pkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zap566mr4al83ig7t1sgj58atstg7bdthbtgtld0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zahr06581efvinqdbmbb3n98lcpn3vqmf7a6q2q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze4urlqta42nq7gb5u5a15085q4bu651ubkj73f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlkvbj9nf7s9jat6uk7a31v7uvk8mse7g5pthkc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmpbjpm4fh4hpmb51gscddu0hu69oabk0382fuvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zkhuj009dh7fc52p928jlt84d35vj0pinlft60l0).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zplb6ui8ok06ibt9is3qgec9kvvpdlojvj2taa28_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm2ob2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
Help me ensure our new House majority addresses your top priorities.
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=bd8dd6124cd248a0aecb622a2a08c862&_e=bch9BGFrMC3jQN51Z9hcF3nGT-YySVG1rD6u_YZ5ky3U-uOVQPkkzJ2XFN_TZBDJOw7OCcVNqvO2qZWiVS_r93-3nzg0_W6FidHqYiPQNfwVP5zuorSHjbZ85FV_1EFbqvrCOaNX8LIq3dTRAc1nhz66RLvigD1vPcUenYU9PFD-ubnvpTcHkyN37gd--OE3_TQCuz7CdqMu5n579CCUeTLodidwZ9lvEN_KoAUiWny8mjd45pVJYDpWlPt167qSyU1N7nTICquqyJw4ZGpFk6KtmviEt0GX23m_drrDNXt_DZscjlmLelq7hpdw4HnfnXZIGp31MCtOiI1-ERfX-KT9E0syTot_-PdqpwqENYM%3D)

Peter,
---
This past year you helped to elect a new House majority that you knew would fight for YOU.
---
That’s why as our new majority gets to work, I want to hear your top issues and concerns to ensure we are fighting for what this country needs every step of the way.
---
[**Please take my New House Majority Survey to ensure we address your priorities and continue to fight for YOU in Congress.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=bd8dd6124cd248a0aecb622a2a08c862&_e=bch9BGFrMC3jQN51Z9hcF3nGT-YySVG1rD6u_YZ5ky3U-uOVQPkkzJ2XFN_TZBDJOw7OCcVNqvO2qZWiVS_r93-3nzg0_W6FidHqYiPQNfwVP5zuorSHjbZ85FV_1EFbqvrCOaNX8LIq3dTRAc1nhz66RLvigD1vPcUenYU9PFD-ubnvpTcHkyN37gd--OE3_TQCuz7CdqMu5n579CCUeUlQ11y6k_u6B3WYB3NTmXReKF20FjhANlqsD05-h520AIZ1Gbg5RvX4e4nFCW4oqXSIgDTwig4nydMSEmsMvxrGHkZXYGJONoARn-tQXBWWsjUiJKCr9tYX2XbpNS4SXzJt7xAFqPRNxJB6D3ZTiys%3D)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=bd8dd6124cd248a0aecb622a2a08c862&_e=bch9BGFrMC3jQN51Z9hcF3nGT-YySVG1rD6u_YZ5ky3U-uOVQPkkzJ2XFN_TZBDJOw7OCcVNqvO2qZWiVS_r93-3nzg0_W6FidHqYiPQNfwVP5zuorSHjbZ85FV_1EFbqvrCOaNX8LIq3dTRAc1nhz66RLvigD1vPcUenYU9PFD-ubnvpTcHkyN37gd--OE3_TQCuz7CdqMu5n579CCUefkLJ-vpqwMreXFymHUDRUEg30tcAImTKV9CxUDslKeQGzGEu2ympt27xaMF3rsrC_Sk01o2oEtV9a0Acyu-zL-LbxKsPCDotDxB9CgnJx3qyOaAgeQIno2smwS0odjZRpIwsdykTy1is8l6mq2gTOI%3D)
---

Our country faces multiple crises thanks to the Biden Administration such as high inflation, rising crime, and a wide-open border.
---
**And Americans like you are counting on us to get our country back on track.**
---
__By reclaiming the House majority, we have secured the critical check we needed on the Biden Administration’s disastrous and dangerous agenda to ensure a prosperous future for America._ _
---
But as we begin this new year with our new majority, it’s essential for our top priorities to be the issues and concerns of Americans like you, and that’s why I need you to complete my survey as soon as possible.
---
[**So please, take my New House Majority Survey to ensure we address your priorities and continue to fight for YOU in Congress.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=bd8dd6124cd248a0aecb622a2a08c862&_e=bch9BGFrMC3jQN51Z9hcF3nGT-YySVG1rD6u_YZ5ky3U-uOVQPkkzJ2XFN_TZBDJOw7OCcVNqvO2qZWiVS_r93-3nzg0_W6FidHqYiPQNfwVP5zuorSHjbZ85FV_1EFbqvrCOaNX8LIq3dTRAc1nhz66RLvigD1vPcUenYU9PFD-ubnvpTcHkyN37gd--OE3_TQCuz7CdqMu5n579CCUeS5Xr7VPLxqnRa33IOmfnqGothm22fkFiLZX1JkxKNfqZI2kkvkKaHHa0p0fMSqbU8wY0BXqVfgvU8hjM2YIHXcihxntDBS7N9B7j_16ZRXK5G5P8YegV9WPVwtZuzDfdBSKUE4Rj0MjlnaihbsVtvY%3D)

Now that we’ve officially fired Pelosi, it's finally time to roll up our sleeves and get down to the real business at hand:

| |

| | | **House Speaker Kevin McCarthy follows through with key promise after taking gavel**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Friend, now that we've officially fired Pelosi, it's finally time to roll up our sleeves and get down to the real business at hand: representing the American people the way that they deserve to be represented. Under my leadership, the 118th Congress is going to work like hell to stop Biden's disastrous agenda and put Conservative values back into national legislation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56nn805u8sua2pcnd3k1at10pqfhoponl1vtb28_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jm6oj4clh2bs)
---

Our first order of business was to erase Biden's plan to hire 87,000 more IRS agents - we are making that happen. Friend, we're fully committed to delivering the results you elected us for, and I hope that this victory proves how excited and motivated we are to represent the will of the people.

We've got a long laundry list of Biden-era problems that need fixing, from the IRS to China, but rest assured, we will stop at _nothing_ to set this country back on the right path. However, we can't do it alone. That's why we're asking _every_ true patriot to stand with us against the leftist policies forced on our nation by Biden's corrupt allies. It's time to decide: will you stand with us, for the future of America?

Tonight, he asked the General Assembly during his State of the Commonwealth address to send him a bill that would ban abortion. Delegate Marie March and Senator Travis Hackworth are carrying a “life begins at conception” bill that would ban abortion completely. We’ve all seen the cruel impact of abortion bans across the nation. It’s up to us, Virginia Democrats, to ensure that never becomes a reality in our Commonwealth. = Glenn Youngkin and his GOP won’t give up this fight, and we need to be prepared to fight them every step of the way.= VADEMS | =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. [**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9466b68b2afd47f1ab590ee7a0de7777&_e=XdCSdRICdTSOSu824PS5O1cm1ZFVvFyrX5GmVnT_GYzvc8Q_t5_Y60qLTgJmSUTOM1L5IJPBVubwb8qOAjh0gWCvJ3jU5cCs12d6pgy-2fX-1N2BGo-lQWVJ3M2mFk2hMO_s5jWjkDFr3CdkuLFQJk-OQENxGe6dC6mFm7OnwlV8BPVrBD4Y9znUHgCJ3F2fWuwKDhDqLLHAbPLh1fsxiraQp8Hzzd9O2ag4I9MVMjPUpcuQOs4J1l7Al4cwSkwPW8dqn2myUxdctRrKNDR8LMSkQbU-EPBg3g1surp1QvN4KbGOcGQAvM10JvGYg9FnwPBMuexJyaZ4f_bnanikUw%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9466b68b2afd47f1ab590ee7a0de7777&_e=XdCSdRICdTSOSu824PS5O1cm1ZFVvFyrX5GmVnT_GYzvc8Q_t5_Y60qLTgJmSUTOM1L5IJPBVubwb8qOAjh0gWCvJ3jU5cCs12d6pgy-2fX-1N2BGo-lQWVJ3M2mFk2hMO_s5jWjkDFr3CdkuLFQJk-OQENxGe6dC6mFm7OnwlV8BPVrBD4Y9znUHgCJ3F2f20FcXbEJl5TiHcHdDuKyDZqU0GcoylFCIxl8UJoCz-NIvwnaSyn6LFcxPqYMtVrGN0G0U77xdBMsxOYmElq0B8H915G7gm6bP-DlfxGbedDG0J9yghWxB4LLqDVodVByQWwWG8CG3045b5_pTG7X-w%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9466b68b2afd47f1ab590ee7a0de7777&_e=XdCSdRICdTSOSu824PS5O1cm1ZFVvFyrX5GmVnT_GYzvc8Q_t5_Y60qLTgJmSUTOM1L5IJPBVubwb8qOAjh0gWCvJ3jU5cCs12d6pgy-2fX-1N2BGo-lQWVJ3M2mFk2hMO_s5jWjkDFr3CdkuLFQJk-OQENxGe6dC6mFm7OnwlV8BPVrBD4Y9znUHgCJ3F2fZH_HdLBE2lenYFdx6JNKCQ5-WSTX3y55nl_3VJUkwDztHr_N-H_TfEGULTCJ1Vl_vF3pugbuT03Uw4PKNs_zXjzhoq3pW0nKtoxFVvFwunTNr9j2uATgX-2MGiT-DBHbPHAUrPcx5xYDQzTkQhFJhQ%3D%3D)
