At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again. You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building. Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway. Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba! Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days. That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court. I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Breaking: Pritzker warns conservatives there will be consequences
body:
With Illinois now the 9th state to ban assault weapons, Gov. Pritzker gives a warning to conservatives across the state: there will be consequences.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7dbb4717b136/breaking-pritzker-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Pritzker Signs Assault Weapons Ban, Warns Conservatives There Will be Consequences for Breaking the Law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Late Tuesday evening, Illinois became the 9th state in the nation to ban assault weapons after Gov. JB Pritzker, D, held a signing ceremony at the State Capitol in Springfield. After the ceremony, Prtizker spoke to the press, where he had a stern warning for conservatives across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Earlier in the day, the Democrat-controlled Illinois Senate ** passed (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/politics/state/2023/01/10/illinois-senate-passes-own-version-of-assault-style-weapons-ban/69792699007/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
an amended version of the assault weapons ban, 34-20, before sending it back to the House for a vote on the final version before sending it to Gov. Pritzker for his signature.

Former Republican nominee for governor and State Sen. Darren Bailey did not hold back on the Senate floor, telling his colleagues that the State Supreme Court will rule the bill as unconstitutional.

“You’ve got to know the actions that you are taking are tyrannous. You also must know that I and millions of other gun owners in this state will not comply.”

The Illinois State Rifle Association – an organization that Democratic legislators did not consult with when drafting the bill, didn’t mix words either, sending out a simple statement earlier in the day that
** said (https://archive.aweber.com/newsletter/awlist4894361/MTczMTczMjQ=/anti-2a-bill-on-the-way-to-the-governor-s-desk.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“Challenge accepted. The Illinois State Rifle Association will see the State of Illinois in court.”
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The Illinois State Rifle Association’s letter to Democrat leaders in Illinois on January 10, 2023.
(Source: ILSRA)

The ** Democrats (https://dailycaller.com/2022/04/04/zero-senate-democrats-willing-define-woman/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
can’t even define what a woman is, so how then do we expect them to define what an assault weapon is?

The Democrat-controlled Illinois House passed the final version of the Senate bill late Tuesday, 68-41. Outgoing Republican House Minority Leader Jim Durkin joined the Democrats and voted in favor of the assault weapons ban.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
IL GOP House Leader Jim Durkin votes with Democrats in favor of the assault weapons ban on January 10, 2023, moments before it was sent to Gov. Pritzker to sign into law. (Source: Twitter/Alex_Degman)

On Sunday, Durkin announced that after more than 24 years in the Illinois legislature, he was ** resigning (https://www.chicagotribune.com/politics/ct-jim-durkin-resigning-house-seat-20230108-f6f6lkonprdsnmdlzmz3vhc4im-story.html?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Breaking%20News&utm_content=861673214246&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
his seat. In November, the day after the election, ** Durkin (https://abc7chicago.com/jim-durkin-illinois-election-results-2022-news/12438033/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
announced that he was resigning as House Minority Leader.

During the midterm election, Durkin suffered embarrassing losses, giving House Democrats once again, supermajority control in the Illinois House.

In an interview with the
** Chicago Tribune (https://www.chicagotribune.com/politics/ct-jim-durkin-resigning-house-seat-20230108-f6f6lkonprdsnmdlzmz3vhc4im-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, Durkin blamed the Second Amendment and social issues like abortion for Republican losses in November.

But for Durkin to suggest that Second Amendment and pro-life issues are “dragging” the Republican party down is an insult. These are the issues that make us Republicans in the first place.

In the last week,
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
has published several articles about Durkin using his political influence to target conservative grassroots candidates during the Illinois Primary.

Sources also confirmed to
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that the IL GOP is blaming Durkin for the party’s postage discount abuse, where mailers “Paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois” were sent during the primary to viciously attack conservative Republican grassroots candidates that were challenging Durkin’s friends and political allies.

And now the IL GOP faces a potential ** postage discount audit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that could be damaging, with some suggesting that an audit could even bankrupt the party, and force a restructuring of the entire leadership.

But while the assault weapons ban is now law in Illinois, expect massive lawsuits in the coming days and weeks challenging this unconstitutional law.

Just minutes after Pritzker signed the bill, former Republican nominee for attorney general and attorney
** Tom DeVore (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, who successfully sued the Pritzker administration that resulted in the ** removal of masks in schools (https://www.tomdevore.com/victory-judge-rules-pritzkers-mandates-moot/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, announced that he is partnering with members of the legal profession to file a lawsuit immediately.

Please continue to follow Illinois Review for more updates as they become available.

** (https://youtu.be/mkUFRhvI42M?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Illinois Review publisher Scott Kaspar and editor-in-chief Mark Vargas discuss Gov. Pritzker's motivation for signing the Assault Weapons Ban, on the Jan. 8, 2023 "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer.

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5dae49e089-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_11_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5dae49e089-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, 721 days. Billions of taxpayer dollars wasted. Nearly 4.3 million border crossings since President Biden took office. Enough fentanyl crossing the border to kill every American. That’s what it took for President Biden to finally take a trip to the southern border. It’s too little, too late. Biden’s failures can’t be fixed with a photo op at the border. He must do more. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. Friend,
We are already under attack.

The Democrats have already begun plotting their revenge for 2024 and are doing whatever it takes to win. They are lying, cheating and even colluding to win.

But thanks to your support this past cycle, we won and were able to support EVERY Republican who needed our support.

I am excited to be a part of the effort to win elections across the country and build a brighter future for all Americans. As you may know, political campaigns are expensive, especially with the Democrats using the Hollywood Liberals and the Coastal Elite to fund their campaigns.

clean_body: | | | | The clock is against us. | Friend, We are already under attack. The Democrats have already begun plotting their revenge for 2024 and are doing whatever it takes to win. They are lying, cheating and even colluding to win. But thanks to your support this past cycle, we won and were able to support EVERY Republican who needed our support. I am excited to be a part of the effort to win elections across the country and build a brighter future for all Americans. As you may know, political campaigns are expensive, especially with the Democrats using the Hollywood Liberals and the Coastal Elite to fund their campaigns. I will need your help, Friend, to ensure that we have the resources we need to reach out to voters and share our vision. That's why I am writing to ask for your support. Whether you are able to contribute a little or a lot, every donation makes a difference. | | | | | I am confident that with your help, we can win elections in 2024 to keep the House, take a majority in the Senate and get a Republican president! Will you join me in this effort by making a donation today? Please visit to make your contribution online. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Harriet Hageman | | | | |

body:
\
A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlg4ckdmfce2pu6ah9prmik5fisf1032ek4jk9bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jmepj4s1h2bs)

| | | Friend,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It’s because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

I am 100% funded by the people because that’s the **ONLY** constituency I swore to serve. I stood up for you when it mattered, and [_**now I’m asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 today.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5iftfmcj5ffedplf18g66sggmmspg8vsknnq500_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5jmepj4s1h2bs)

name: Team ODP
subject: We need your help to fight back against these dangerous voting laws, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Republicans at the Statehouse just came after our right to vote again, team.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57216735/387191921/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2IwZjhiNy0wMzkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=btYnX-cbwaj1WpTIwIIA4Cp0OL8e6QXERjO88XZKJMs=) | Republicans at the Statehouse just came after our right to vote again, team.

Only a few days into the New Year, Governor Mike DeWine signed a bill into law – one of the worst anti-voter bills in the country – that will make it even harder for working Ohioans to make their voices heard at the polls.

While we remain committed to fighting back to protect the right to vote – extreme Ohio Republicans are further rigging the rules in their favor so that they can keep lining the pockets of their corporate donors and leave working families behind.

We all must work together to fight against Ohio Republicans' future anti-voter attacks. It's crucial we elect more Democrats from the Statehouse to the U.S. Senate – but in order to do that – we need the support of this grassroots team.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: First, we won. Then, bills came due.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Polls were tight. Our budget was tighter.
| | |
---
Hi there,

FIRST, polls tightened and GOP spending skyrocketed in the final days of the campaign. Pundits doubted whether we could win.

As a result, we made aggressive investments in additional advertising to ensure that we could win. We hoped that we would be able to increase our fundraising to keep up with the growing onslaught of last-ditch spending by Republicans.

We now have a hole to fill to get those last bills paid.

[Will you please chip in $3 or as much as you can to help retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57202231/387158798/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2181-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZkNzVjYi1kOTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yUn4PVYWpYXWP-TfHduHIf5x0CNSnJ08zu8BLnPV86M=)

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.

If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57202232/387158804/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2181-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDZkNzVjYi1kOTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yUn4PVYWpYXWP-TfHduHIf5x0CNSnJ08zu8BLnPV86M=)**

With every good wish,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX8Nvmn0guCLD1tt97K9NGmTPTUooKyihmIb__2upluWEUJyv3PvAY4uMy4o4ykVeaRKBjIzTWRLSIGmGa4i5RlNFKdgCiyZkIqZlLBUO2n7xHitQ2eHq_YK6yVpRhd1ZW7qusk4kzVwUYtCZTk3VOXoRY3iJurLLoTpRugLgQPu1UeN7iFD0yVe3-9ohNhrp12tffzF49ERepiDu9zG2Tea0OqvaoIiwFfZaWVn7K1k_SSNdJO07YDMrUy6cR4CVpD_dIxD0Bsamj6uuu4T3NHsGcqXobcKhX-wswpfX4012x2n933kSzU9bN_bGxeYTruls4aBd_fWLCURrwRgGwPY_g1zoGd5On34JS6uWfyWn6FdRdjhGZZJ_3Y-TZIt9JWK6htAS4m9) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEFzgyAQhX8N3nR0IWgPHtrY9NJc2kl6zCAsSiPqEEzqvy86aadThmFmv7f7gIdlxnPKeErzTaRKBiLTMjIlpEDTLKwi5RlNFKegi1CyXCimU8JStMJ0iXaIvjX9GZ0K9ZzIwUZtCYC1RK4YaI1aFIXkeZ2hSgXn9QNA1JWt9-OF0EcCu7AXHzXYm_CyTRxer8EoYIcWbY0u_uTxYAndTd6eLsPkJBJa_VW1VwT4IltUZgq9lajvRAo7CtP0gdmFCTtMvQ8VbH46ht7jinrZxV979XGd4L1fLE99Z1QQ_sHWqPD6aqjZ9m18fY5cqcab6Tpz4XlIp1nTWcIId3dGzyXJnwjAOgaw_hsmT4_icNi7OS7OWfyyOUKziLANp59H_O28myRr6AvNq2-bQ4tV)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX8Nvmn0gmIffFjr2pctWZa0y54alEtlFTWIbfz3Q9MtywghOd-59wIHiyTjlGUx5WkgCwYiUXWgC4iBxolfeZwlNJIZBZV7ybiQTMWExWiEbiNlEV2juyta6fUc1b0JmgLjKhcqFcCreAO-kTOkyGspcwWQyqAtGueGkdAnAnu_lzmyN3fh6iayeLv5QR5bNGgqtOFXFvaG0P3kzHnsJ1sjoeVfVzlJIFtsg1JPvrYU1YPUwgxCXzrPzMKE6afOeQXpT0XfOVxRV7fh9roZP98-Onbw9rlrtfTGP9ho6V9f9hXbvQ8vz4Et5HDXbavHjPt0Lms6Sxj-7laruSB8SwDWNoD13zA5ehLH46udw_yahIf0BJfFhJ0_3Tzgb-VjSLSGvlBefgM97YnD)

Friend, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. **

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.
**[So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC during the next 24 hours and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57202857/387160648/-1022007294?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2179-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxN2FmMTgxLWRhOTEtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5amFQLN3zjhj7z3FJqYLlOe6SYnDgAYDQNa0niNUE18=) **
Keep the faith,
Hakeem
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It’s because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

name: Extended deadline for you (via VPP)
subject: last chance to congratulate Hakeem Jeffries!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
your signature needed by midnight >>
| **We noticed your signature was missing from our letter to Hakeem Jeffries — _so we’re extending our deadline for just 10 more hours!_** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries made HISTORY last week as the first Black American to lead a major political party in Congress.

So we’re reaching out to top Democrats one last time to congratulate him on this outstanding achievement! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=6&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=7&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=8&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=9&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=10&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38293?t=11&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6002%2E878179%2EyQzw4s)

Now, more have been found. Aides to the President have discovered another batch of documents in another location. As NBC News reported, there was an “additional batch of classified documents in a location separate [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- | #### [ Family of Naval Officer Jailed In Japan Plead Biden to Secure His Release The parents of Navy lieutenant Ridge Alkonis, who is serving a three-year jail sentence in Japan, are pleading for President Biden to secure their son’s release when the president meets with Japanese officials this week. Alkonis was convicted of negligent driving by Japanese courts in October 2021 after he was involved in a vehicle accident [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- | #### [ Plane's Door Rips Open During a Horrifying Commercial Flight Passengers in Russia recently suffered quite the scare after the rear door on an old, Russian-made Antonov AN-26 malfunctioned and opened mid-flight. Passengers items were suddenly sucked out of the aircraft into the frigid, below freezing air. In modern airplanes it is impossible for a cabin door to open mid-flight without any other damage. We were SHOCKED when Republicans voted for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.
That's why we emailed you asking you to sign the petition to BAN Trump from office.
But we just checked and we're MISSING your signature!
With Donald Trump's announcement that he's running for President AGAIN, we must do everything we can to stop him.
That's why we're collecting 5,000 signatures to our urgent petition to BAN Trump from office. Sign your name now: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-trump-poll-5]

Thanks for signing,
Team DASS

[URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT]
5,000 Signatures Needed: Demand Congress invoke the 14th Amendment to BAN Trump from office → [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-trump-poll-5]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-trump-poll-5]
Donald Trump officially announced a THIRD run for President!
But Amy Klobuchar is dropping the hammer on his plans. She’s urging Congress to invoke the 14th Amendment and BLOCK Trump from running!

Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-trump-poll-5]

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: our campaign debt will be public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
We won’t let them destroy all of our hard work.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217499/387195416/-269365724?refcode=EM_FR_231111HassanSplit_FR_MH_90DO_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWZjNWVmMi0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jv0deYWrjq7vHtqN2v32b87i9PxRCNvWSsOSNGliio=) _Hi – Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off. If you could give $10 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-hassan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217500/387195417/-269365724?refcode=EM_FR_EM_FR_231111HassanSplit_FR_MH_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWZjNWVmMi0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jv0deYWrjq7vHtqN2v32b87i9PxRCNvWSsOSNGliio=)** _ Look – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding we needed would come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. With help from folks like you, we made a pretty good dent in it before closing the books on 2022, but we’ve still got a little more to go. You’re one of my most important supporters and I’m hoping I can count on you to help close out the 2022 campaign once and for all: Will you please split $10 or as much as you can between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give. I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing. If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-hassan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217501/387195418/-269365724?refcode=EM_FR_EM_FR_231111HassanSplit_FR_MH_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWZjNWVmMi0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jv0deYWrjq7vHtqN2v32b87i9PxRCNvWSsOSNGliio=)** Thank you for your help. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ** ** | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217502/387195419/-269365724?refcode=EM_FR_231111HassanSplit_FR_MH_90DO_7_NG_N_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWZjNWVmMi0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jv0deYWrjq7vHtqN2v32b87i9PxRCNvWSsOSNGliio=)****

| | The truth will prevail as we welcome the new Republican-controlled Congress. It’s due time that Congress starts to display core competency in governing and listening to the American People. We urge the Republican-led house to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable for their reckless behavior. This significant win for republicans restores hope for true reform in America. By going back to the basics of American principles. Our American Greatness mission addresses fiscal responsibility in Government, restoring law and order, American Sovereignty, and Constitutional Government. We support the republican majority undergoing investigations of the origins of the COVID pandemic; fraud and abuse of the Paycheck Protection Program and pandemic-related unemployment insurance; the crisis at the southern border; and the botched American withdrawal from Afghanistan. Support the party of **accountability,** **responsibility** , and **reform** for the American people.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6uN5f6wyrtwOtEEHDhvUMg&sysid=1 Zelenskyy’s Golden Globe Speech: Discusses Possibility Of World War III

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy delivered a video message at the 80th Golden Globes on Tuesday where he promised that Ukraine will win the war against Russia and prevent a third World War. Zelenskyy began his speech by harkening to the first Golden Globes which took place during the latter stages of World War II, “The Second World War wasn’t over yet but the tide was turned all knew who would win,” he stated. He said that it is currently a similar situation in their war with Russia and he believes “the tide is turning” in favor of the Ukrainians.

clean_body: Will you chip in $10 to renew your 2023 official membership right | | | | | Our records show your 2023 DLCC Membership is inactive. | SUPPORTER: 2023 MEMBERSHIP: Inactive SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. But we can’t stop now. We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have nearly a dozen special elections in the next two months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership today you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in? body:
The last two disastrous election seasons have shown the desperate need for...| | | Peter, _Delayed election results..._

_100-day legal fights..._ _Shady mail-in ballot tactics..._ The last two disastrous elections have shown our country's desperate need for election integrity reform. And now, with Republicans taking back the House, **there’s no better time to do it.** But I need your help to continue leading this fight and keep it on track this year. **[Peter, will you energize the fight for election integrity with a critical first donation in 2023?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d43df1585c5a48af966eeb01247eda0f&_e=rbggLlEcVx9U2hvlQNlOORDaJWrWHpcN8KT1WYufyi2MUCJQ-nacfNLz_rpd4NpQRvKO2ttoJYNlN2N4AhpQbREsxIfBQCqaMJmqF0PP9aL41c1U7RomVAnIT90-dlY4FprsJD7UG5roSmnvcIT34b-PZtZKRv2u3ux9_POajvosRghfgTaZhO8cpeCtPAYIwi5MV0L0J5BQzePPegbimaPoKJxhkAVicVg0mzWPLOBC4sb4J2OOb1_TACX1DahAmFIbOKzx8EPJIw8ZatcNmWzxxO6QlQc2Dtffn-UG9B2rUB9wgDHVHRpf_QuRfyQZ1W4BNld9hLNlvvlDqjA3LkKDzy9riJFRN9jv3MtTxquegEn0IjnZv81EmThJ5yaeqUHgpArVv1nnJQL9TIx8AbqjjXrBrGPeHbyqzVSKSkeRQx3zuBtdjy1tF14x7ibN)** \- Claudia Tenney \---------- forwarded message below ----------To: [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d43df1585c5a48af966eeb01247eda0f&_e=rbggLlEcVx9U2hvlQNlOORDaJWrWHpcN8KT1WYufyi2MUCJQ-nacfNLz_rpd4NpQRvKO2ttoJYNlN2N4AhpQbX-Dqu7tF4jEmNe34fKwN0a4E967vGw5yOhWiCknQQuYC4IQhNzM7VyA-7cxhGiqokKE_o_bKU98oNNFlnorxqn0MyY_y9MHtZhmSWWcJEQDch4bXocdipWyMGcCQSaU9R_4e-0qhNLPKKpt9Y0nmc3lUPXBVq7WYIYCyKelzSHjDRLJHQOYrW5P15Hu4B6fnMqKkNsyKd246nW1_wCxiy66YqR5D5yiCSotPDYltzDG1txyB1wK1SLOfDM-peGBbkxgsyTIf31bDL6wAjlQqofwjtwxN9ZTA-7waywnAvSVAikbOATjbGjA2KqlgeT0LzQEWqA6Dd9jH1DaFkoHQdo%3D) Subject Line: number #1 issue in 2023

Peter, 2023 must be the year to get election integrity work done in Congress. As Co-Chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, it will be **my number #1 issue this year,** but it also needs to be the _main focus_ for the rest of Congress. We need _free_ , _fair_ , _accurate_ , and _transparent_ elections to maintain the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. **NO ONE** is fighting harder than me every day to protect our elections. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll energize my fight in the New Year by [**making a first donation of 2023 >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=d43df1585c5a48af966eeb01247eda0f&_e=rbggLlEcVx9U2hvlQNlOORDaJWrWHpcN8KT1WYufyi2MUCJQ-nacfNLz_rpd4NpQRvKO2ttoJYNlN2N4AhpQbREsxIfBQCqaMJmqF0PP9aL41c1U7RomVAnIT90-dlY4FprsJD7UG5roSmnvcIT34b-PZtZKRv2u3ux9_POajvosRghfgTaZhO8cpeCtPAYIwi5MV0L0J5BQzePPegbimaPoKJxhkAVicVg0mzWPLOBC4sb4J2OOb1_TACX1DahAmFIbOKzx8EPJIw8ZatcNmX8Il6uvpiZUw6ACVcNSd8584bK4dsxoqM7oelqIYZsMV3hra0tXYWA-x-VYvXpvSueezaZo6Mh0dymekAT_0YZc_rg_vYBX3smWIiUqlEIfnEWs1MlOa-mCk6RmAaaZf3h1eu5f91V0NdAErT9QIqRUiAx806YU30yx5nvWEWlW)

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s been *quite* a few days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, it's John
Just last week I was sworn in as PA’s newest Senator, and let me tell you, it has been *quite* a few days since. 🙃
The GOP can’t seem to get itself in order, but we can’t let that stop Democrats from fighting to deliver for working people. I’m in the Senate to push to *finally* raise the minimum wage, slash “out of pocket” health care costs, + so much more.
**[I can’t do any of it alone. That’s why I’ve got to ask: Can I count on you to make your VERY FIRST donation of 2023 to support our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230111-1?refcode=em20230111-1-8203&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230111-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230111-8203&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)**
I need you with me in this fight. We send you these emails because every time, someone chips in for the first time — **[or the first time in 2023!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230111-1?refcode=em20230111-1-8203&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)** — and person by person, we’re able to power our efforts in DC.
Standing up to GOP chaos and extremism is really important work. We’ll only be able to do it if we do it together. 💪
**[So, what do you say? Will you chip in any amount as your FIRST donation of 2023 so I can keep fighting for the needs of working people in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230111-1?refcode=em20230111-1-8203&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)**
I’m so thankful you believe in our mission to deliver for PA. Seriously, thank you soooo much.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.S. Our records show your highest previous donation is $5. I’m so grateful you’re one of our amazing grassroots donors, Derek! **[If you can spare it, it would mean so much to me if you matched your past support + chipped in $5 as your first donation of 2023.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230111-1?refcode=em20230111-1-8203&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230111-8203-footer&t=1&refcode2=8203_434096_hJUzD7&akid=8203%2E434096%2EhJUzD7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Being a Real Man may be Toxic...
body:
But it's what women want.

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**

The culture tells us that being a real man is toxic, but that's exactly
what women want... because masculine energy means putting purpose above
safety.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos is being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Investigators were put onto his tracks by Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW.)
body:
Tracking down the crooks
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbae2c6b5-47ac-46b1-8828-bbfc97ab3ee9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, George Santos is being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Investigators were put onto his tracks by Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW.) [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5650e436-acab-43b9-9ccb-8e2c3897a283/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In addition to the fact he's wanted in Brazil for using a stolen checkbook and fake name to commit bank fraud, **Congressmen Ritchie Torres and Dan Goldman hand delivered an ethics complaint to Santos' office that they filed with the Congressional Ethics Office because Santos' breaking campaign finance law numerous times.** He ignored legally required filings, even more important in his case as he was broke when he ran for office in 2020, but suddenly had millions--a big chunk of which he loaned his campaign--in 2022. We know that the Russian-American cousin of sanctioned Russian oligarch and friend of Putin Viktor Vekselberg funneled nearly $60,000 in total to various PACs, committees and the local Nassau County Republican Party (who just demanded he resign) for Santos' campaign. **But where did the rest of the money come from?** Was it illegally funneled through his business by the same Russians? Others? We don't know because Santos ignored the law and refused to tell us. What Torres and Goldman have done is important, but with Republicans in control jelly-spined Kevin McCarthy will do all he can to weaken this effort.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcb7cf52-009b-4122-b1a1-d0f308c2846c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is why we need Citizens for Responsible Ethics in Washington (CREW) on this. They are the kind of bulldogs who get results, going after names in the past you'll know such as Tom DeLay, Jack Abramoff and you can almost pick any name from the thoroughly corrupt Trump Administration. [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90e0147f-2a84-4eb6-91fc-0ec7e99a653b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for protecting the integrity of our democracy. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9be881c6-12a1-4647-bb06-68a458cce568/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---

| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/crew-santosinvestigation-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d20b2d0-0fbf-4fb0-a475-6e8866948250/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b46e534143ae4e5aab0bb427a139d28b&_e=hlgaGKdnwuOeg-GymvhKSYxjyl2vMm7KlCbSQ1evVttFOAc3v7-xeD104jZY0iI524xykcmqM_s3tDidRCq84cydkHcaJarTATzTuDSDmM-ip68GsAgDzurZA6a8TZ7MBYspn96sNjL_4fRRpKgeEYpeOtf8plmZhgNc7vSUHSAgLTW8cK_IArzln2_sAg0tOh2rICPaseJ3VlXkXxHE3_ctwzeDgRnmTf6-aMg1329WmUdviZk-EoodinLHCe2fIyX7B2-JzXgKpG3yAIWFHiXnhVkJBHpbmjXQbDjblNKQ2Tkgjg_ad93DACi1dUe2G4WCtHeIrpm-wcowtoKxH_8Rgh4jZWmCnYjm7UCdz7Y7FKv8YgW0rCdociLuN5eTK5WUZZoSWtK4DE1Ns7BkgQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b46e534143ae4e5aab0bb427a139d28b&_e=hlgaGKdnwuOeg-GymvhKSYxjyl2vMm7KlCbSQ1evVttFOAc3v7-xeD104jZY0iI524xykcmqM_s3tDidRCq84cydkHcaJarTATzTuDSDmM-ip68GsAgDzurZA6a8TZ7MBYspn96sNjL_4fRRpKgeEYpeOtf8plmZhgNc7vSUHSAgLTW8cK_IArzln2_sAg0tOh2rICPaseJ3VlXkXxHE3_ctwzeDgRnmTf6-aMg132-MfiUcqZnpsuzOiA1NYUerzawDbrXS0c4LUfyd6Pcclzpz35b3ivxiqIZe6Sl_7s_X1AgWT6lriQP8cfPLJLm80NLDlv5cQv75T94JUy2hZG5-x8Z9LvtmOO7wSQmaO6mFGcF0vwfECSrGDtxGxqsVTGiHX_kduWtDF-dfblEu3g%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b46e534143ae4e5aab0bb427a139d28b&_e=hlgaGKdnwuOeg-GymvhKSYxjyl2vMm7KlCbSQ1evVttFOAc3v7-xeD104jZY0iI524xykcmqM_s3tDidRCq84cydkHcaJarTATzTuDSDmM-ip68GsAgDzurZA6a8TZ7MBYspn96sNjL_4fRRpKgeEYpeOtf8plmZhgNc7vSUHSAgLTW8cK_IArzln2_sAg0tOh2rICPaseJ3VlXkXxHE3_ctwzeDgRnmTf6-aMg132-mkIF1vVbkxgHmZoPS_RUNCvtPVXJIbcVc6XkVJI3JkBhe3dR3wwmmgtJY17hu7gKzNJ4kGXHtI46dFpVLsBJ2cZnSKhcvYw5c8MEvmIEE1W6FaRHdWvBOmD_r7lqz4IrSSl3KuFg5lKDvYsZcqT9hitL0GeCgjsDR6uKWOOVSrA%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmip3mq3b353lju99e96d72ack6le2hrhnt9t6o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0gm8efludlirci58jiq1k92uqfkt1jpvqlo1io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs67mkongbtoliipct8ms44fc9rh3755981p24o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z08oru0sjdafmh0obcuoil2c0j87ghpkctvtpu38_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zosihuj2bhppkm2g2ubv3vmvf4gu4pftt760jlg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z76cdknll7bv2ivp949hs5n79k5am2jk95rfnlug_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zsuheho7mp3egjre6lbbsrotp8ise6rbg65on1pg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjohmmheo247e8k1e2s2l5l26690p7ts4tk4u6d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c5gecob4cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Katie Porter for Senate
subject: What makes our race different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
How familiar are you with California’s primary system?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15676%2E3422442%2EGNsTg1)
Derek, how familiar are you with California’s primary system?

If you’re a Californian (like us) you probably know all about it! But, in case you’re not familiar, we’re going to break it down for you, because it’s going to have a _huge_ impact on our campaign.
**[First, though, if you’re ready to support Katie Porter for Senate and want to help make sure we have the resources we’ll need to win both the primary and the general election, please chip in right now to become a Founding Donor.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14654?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=2&akid=15676%2E3422442%2EGNsTg1)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14654?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=3&akid=15676%2E3422442%2EGNsTg1)**
**Okay, let’s get into it!

In most places, candidates from different political parties run in separate primaries. The primaries decide which candidate will represent each political party in the general election. So Democrats vote in the Democratic primary, and they choose the Democratic nominee who will then represent the Democratic party in the general election.

But, in California, every candidate participates in the same primary election. The two candidates who get the most votes in the primary move on to the general election, _regardless of which party they belong to_.

This means that the general election isn’t always a contest between a Democrat and a Republican—sometimes, it winds up being a competition between two Democrats.

This could make things _a lot_ more challenging for us! It means that, even if we win the primary, we may not get the wave of post-primary unification and support that primary winners typically get—because our opponent in the general election could very well be another Democrat.

Having a divided Democratic Party in the general election could also make it harder for us to secure the support and resources we’ll need to win, because our general election opponent could be targeting the same donors, supporters, and volunteers that we are.

Plus, Katie is just one of about a dozen Members of Congress who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—so it’s likely our general election opponent does accept this money, giving them a _major_ cash advantage.

That’s why we’re taking action now. The more support we lock down early—the more resources we secure now—the stronger our campaign will be for both the primary and the general election.
**
**[So, if you can, will you please chip in $5 today to help make sure we’ll have the best campaign possible no matter who we end up against? By making a contribution today, you’ll become one of our Founding Donors!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14654?refcode=EMAF10_2_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=4&akid=15676%2E3422442%2EGNsTg1)**
Thank you for your support.
—Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: How familiar are you with California’s primary system? Derek, how familiar are you with California’s primary system? If you’re a Californian (like us) you probably know all about it! But, in case you’re not familiar, we’re going to break it down for you, because it’s going to have a huge impact on our campaign. Okay, let’s get into it! In most places, candidates from different political parties run in separate primaries. The primaries decide which candidate will represent each political party in the general election. So Democrats vote in the Democratic primary, and they choose the Democratic nominee who will then represent the Democratic party in the general election. But, in California, every candidate participates in the same primary election. The two candidates who get the most votes in the primary move on to the general election, regardless of which party they belong to. This means that the general election isn’t always a contest between a Democrat and a Republican—sometimes, it winds up being a competition between two Democrats. This could make things a lot more challenging for us! It means that, even if we win the primary, we may not get the wave of post-primary unification and support that primary winners typically get—because our opponent in the general election could very well be another Democrat. Having a divided Democratic Party in the general election could also make it harder for us to secure the support and resources we’ll need to win, because our general election opponent could be targeting the same donors, supporters, and volunteers that we are. Plus, Katie is just one of about a dozen Members of Congress who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—so it’s likely our general election opponent does accept this money, giving them a major cash advantage. That’s why we’re taking action now. The more support we lock down early—the more resources we secure now—the stronger our campaign will be for both the primary and the general election. Thank you for your support. —Katie Porter for Senate

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: (FOR REVIEW): Peter | LCV Membership Status: [RENEW FOR $5]
body:
__Your impact goes three times as far when you renew today. |
---

|
Peter -- we're following up as part of our annual Membership Drive._****_

[Your. Membership. Matters.](https://links.messages.lcv.)__ Everything we do is made possible by supporters like you, committed environmental activists who fight for a healthier and more just future for our planet and our communities._****_

**Your support has never been more important than it is right now****.** Despite all of the chaos in the House of Representatives, we know that House Republicans are getting ready to roll out a devastating proposal to abolish key environmental protections.

The best thing YOU can do to stop them right now: Fund hard-hitting environmental campaigns. [Renew your LCV membership for just $5 and 3X your impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

| | **
** **League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9Wj0-f~)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[EXPIRED -- renew your membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9Wj0-f~)**** |
---|---|---

**Your membership is critical to protecting climate action.** Your contribution funds campaigns that:
* Pressure Congress to oppose polluters' dirty energy agenda.
* Protect our democracy and voting rights.
* Hold President Biden to his campaign promises.
* Continue the Green Wave of environmental activism in states across the country.
* Fight for environmental justice and ensure that investments are focused in communities of color and low-wealth communities that are disproportionately impacted by environmental harm.

So we're asking: [renew your LCV membership for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for all that you do, today and every day, Peter, to ensure a healthier, safer, and more just future for all.

Adam, Alex, Annie, Norita
LCV Membership Team

body:
Last year, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in Congress passed the historic Inflation Reduction Act. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57212755/387173389/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDk3Y2E4Zi1lYTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwvw69c3QpKQZ61pe0dF33VVvZ1FIaWG7lYLfPha25w=&emci=ebbf2c93-2d91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=5497ca8f-ea91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last year, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in Congress passed the historic Inflation Reduction Act. Part of this legislation **included a $35 per month cap on insulin for seniors that went into effect at the beginning of this year!**

As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows how crucial it is for people to afford the lifesaving insulin they need. But over the last 20 years, she watched as the price of insulin has skyrocketed to upwards of $300 a vial due to Big Pharma's greed.

**No one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need.** This insulin cap will help make that a reality for thousands of Americans – but there is still more work to do to ensure every person can afford their medications.

That's why Kim is fighting to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us.

name: Andrew Wynne
subject: Joe Biden’s Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Biden and the Left are planning a takeover of America's institutions. We have to stop them.| | | Peter, President Trump and Senate Republicans worked tirelessly to secure our judicial system with fair-minded Conservative judges. **Joe Biden is now threatening all that progress...**
---
[**HELP US STOP BIDEN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c9d54fdb494410ab98ca2a3be974275&_e=cIuB-pbdkFzbQ4_vuFeCKn0qUltWb52MHQzyAKrN-H6KpArD6hGYrXfyexDQqbN0v_HH1QT_6gy4nT2dOvnBs0lZHB64Ku2ZLJL2Ltjx-ct3WkxxB-HCqPWH7himv4vlWsM8C6jhT3nPTiukq9D3YJ4AEs4rt1Didc5-beDfwxQs8MKKpOkjA6kvnImHXB7t4xr76QdJUc1D9l5Gu29qsCdNwKF6Tk0irSD8upNfZYchfAZl2CREYy5uI01bFR_dTpx2k7I-czckrAZ7bI1JAXZB7VZxS5SRk0KQ8yX5muDwQMijDejoonM541N4mDSIYagOpPyO3Vsf15EUlGLZWMzMjXLVZPsuG6ZD7WhD4yWW1aDtDukmDhGJmDlwlit_hSGzqf5W15JKbO1Z5R2E8eQGjEnE3ZJpJIbs8jXW_B0%3D)
---
| | Biden and the rest of the far-left are planning a takeover of America's institutions. They want the full power of the U.S. government's executive, legislative, and judicial branches. And the scary thing is, _they're getting closer to accomplishing their goal._ **_[DON'T LET THEM WIN>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c9d54fdb494410ab98ca2a3be974275&_e=cIuB-pbdkFzbQ4_vuFeCKn0qUltWb52MHQzyAKrN-H6KpArD6hGYrXfyexDQqbN0v_HH1QT_6gy4nT2dOvnBs0lZHB64Ku2ZLJL2Ltjx-ct3WkxxB-HCqPWH7himv4vlWsM8C6jhT3nPTiukq9D3YJ4AEs4rt1Didc5-beDfwxQs8MKKpOkjA6kvnImHXB7t4xr76QdJUc1D9l5Gu29qsCdNwKF6Tk0irSD8upNfZYchfAZl2CREYy5uI01bFR_dTpx2k7I-czckrAZ7bI1JAbn6P1JYjpc9-rkKVU-Dad7DDkC99-YcKnTPidBojyCnMjQXiBq5ceZ1b0jmF6F4yeb3828-vqQOYIaqzu87VOSMcM2J2dUYtQNEwRfWKo5HoTlzMlxroW8B5-5A4HzWCM_F1Qo4pwC4RJc-vBVj9j0%3D)_** Democrats have the White House and the Senate, and they're starting to take over the courts...
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c9d54fdb494410ab98ca2a3be974275&_e=cIuB-pbdkFzbQ4_vuFeCKn0qUltWb52MHQzyAKrN-H6KpArD6hGYrXfyexDQqbN0v_HH1QT_6gy4nT2dOvnBs0lZHB64Ku2ZLJL2Ltjx-ct3WkxxB-HCqPWH7himv4vlWsM8C6jhT3nPTiukq9D3YJ4AEs4rt1Didc5-beDfwxQs8MKKpOkjA6kvnImHXB7t4xr76QdJUc1D9l5Gu29qsCdNwKF6Tk0irSD8upNfZYchfAZl2CREYy5uI01bFR_dTpx2k7I-czckrAZ7bI1JAfchKce-kS66UcFDLo0_YDuyHSrP81t5YeEJLwPrKBJ9PDbmnruwFLwwG79GJQZb2fzwIs9KaYnWgbhnXSWG1biFFiw1mqAJ02zmNficebwv28uBl1qO-U37kNHGvO4x9s8f-Frxdk1gzuyCYh3vHR4%3D)
---
**President Trump’s efforts to secure our courts WORKED to fight back against the Left. That’s why Joe Biden is racing to outpace President Trump’s record-setting number of district court judge appointments.** And he isn't slowing down... it’s clear that he’s targeting our courts. With control of the White House and Senate, Democrats can continue to appoint radical woke judges at rapid rates - so we have to fight for our courts harder than ever.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c9d54fdb494410ab98ca2a3be974275&_e=cIuB-pbdkFzbQ4_vuFeCKn0qUltWb52MHQzyAKrN-H6KpArD6hGYrXfyexDQqbN0v_HH1QT_6gy4nT2dOvnBs0lZHB64Ku2ZLJL2Ltjx-ct3WkxxB-HCqPWH7himv4vlWsM8C6jhT3nPTiukq9D3YJ4AEs4rt1Didc5-beDfwxQs8MKKpOkjA6kvnImHXB7t4xr76QdJUc1D9l5Gu29qsCdNwKF6Tk0irSD8upNfZYchfAZl2CREYy5uI01bFR_dTpx2k7I-czckrAZ7bI1JAUOJ63F6n03K1ZMwgXeLVueLBxQWjy1C3YgBHEwan-jEem2fxqAtLABmC3p8yhqbFSTbNZMMMc2VVUUPMudMP8CSHj8QBS9Act1oUkN99nla_RmH6ndlHypk5y6UkmhKX6iaVs2JSxq0QCBERygoR-Y%3D)
---
We **can** take on the radical left. We **can** unite voters across the political spectrum to save America's courts. **But we can't do it without you.** **With your help, we can protect Trump's conservative judicial legacy and keep our courts fair and free.**
---
[**RUSH A DONATION******](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1c9d54fdb494410ab98ca2a3be974275&_e=cIuB-pbdkFzbQ4_vuFeCKn0qUltWb52MHQzyAKrN-H6KpArD6hGYrXfyexDQqbN0v_HH1QT_6gy4nT2dOvnBs0lZHB64Ku2ZLJL2Ltjx-ct3WkxxB-HCqPWH7himv4vlWsM8C6jhT3nPTiukq9D3YJ4AEs4rt1Didc5-beDfwxQs8MKKpOkjA6kvnImHXB7t4xr76QdJUc1D9l5Gu29qsCdNwKF6Tk0irSD8upNfZYchfAZl2CREYy5uI01bFR_dTpx2k7I-czckrAZ7bI1JAaOn2X53C47bLKWb4c876Ury5vPxOh5-UiED9tWv2arp63dAB1Pcbivk1m51FzS0_WFD1w8xGV_5HGCkHuWIpPw9AaWhiZsqvGKWKFP9E95Fg7ovSt5Ruudj3EqQive2g_lofoR0tZmrOAhp-kyxppw%3D)

That’s why Joe Biden is racing to outpace President Trump’s record-setting number of district court judge appointments. And he isn't slowing down... it’s clear that he’s targeting our courts. With control of the White House and Senate, Democrats can continue to appoint radical woke judges at rapid rates - so we have to fight for our courts harder than ever. We can take on the radical left. We can unite voters across the political spectrum to save America's courts. But we can't do it without you. With your help, we can protect Trump's conservative judicial legacy and keep our courts fair and free. Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |
