name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4fc4046b1fd45eea046e96f1756e341&_e=_SeXzEdA2XbhDB7LQdww6zxKrppnkH76An_-9xufq_0EvXk1hewYMjoALoiirWXAiF-s8edqA9ZVXPn1JVWolD8JC8XJIDRBQp57SmpewvCbu29yYlaIsC4sdBmpjW6kHXXL-c6knARMMz12MH93W1WBKAekK2kfZWeFoLmgqWWom5yudKBwIQoaE9IWJvxEr3yXIWKC_QB2kAEVsHzkoarNp0FFhale03Un_Jo_ZwEFOjotOokDnrbhngIImWSvHNO-JmTm2Y5WeH3VFOtvv8GXDNCkS2tgsrQnmY0U0PWZ70LXKbYbhyH8kMsOgeUv_zADrA2WVFndz8rxHvZS4Z4XPQp2OFUkyfbGsK2FvWKUxryCkepoWL2YSHGmopMyPCVE_WPiw78uJh4mDfz4Ng%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4fc4046b1fd45eea046e96f1756e341&_e=_SeXzEdA2XbhDB7LQdww6zxKrppnkH76An_-9xufq_0EvXk1hewYMjoALoiirWXAiF-s8edqA9ZVXPn1JVWolD8JC8XJIDRBQp57SmpewvCbu29yYlaIsC4sdBmpjW6kHXXL-c6knARMMz12MH93W1WBKAekK2kfZWeFoLmgqWWom5yudKBwIQoaE9IWJvxEr3yXIWKC_QB2kAEVsHzkoarNp0FFhale03Un_Jo_ZwFV5HwhtMbA1GgFcemTTkKKoZOeoX0vA9zFZty7jZYjjkitthiLZxcT_NA6Cu6MimFVtTX6SroZFs7H7agHNbf4nZ2JIsZZMLHgcc3mAuaMAVExGcK6KAguE-OZ8UXeTq1_nirbqj2_k5KD2Mbpa03HPf284V77Unj80hTAVLM1ww%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4fc4046b1fd45eea046e96f1756e341&_e=_SeXzEdA2XbhDB7LQdww6zxKrppnkH76An_-9xufq_0EvXk1hewYMjoALoiirWXAiF-s8edqA9ZVXPn1JVWolD8JC8XJIDRBQp57SmpewvCbu29yYlaIsC4sdBmpjW6kHXXL-c6knARMMz12MH93W1WBKAekK2kfZWeFoLmgqWWom5yudKBwIQoaE9IWJvxEr3yXIWKC_QB2kAEVsHzkoarNp0FFhale03Un_Jo_ZwFiHvqR7W287QN0xw4gIn3KqiX__jmoVq2tAU_DCMkpG086i28yN_B-6qsB0e1NGc2XasXmYt-HF3Csi22UnxODBwoyjCWfwavAaMwrQ0G0VJgSYlrYpl1rIg1JmDjOif8N13TWwRwyaRuTMqKxauzvsrw1cTUhyAPHrktdR8jcsg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=a4fc4046b1fd45eea046e96f1756e341&_t=lT-eaU6er5cbqEuFcXlny0V3KSqREYgmtUJZWSVe8z_TJFW7fCuM-1m8UCAfr_SgcpoWgm2cUSGlIstPlrfI87Nv-m5VF89yxRpQiY5e1os%3D)

subject: Have a 2A Task Force New Year!

body:

|

| | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, but now we need your HELP! | | Join the fight to defend your rights! name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is what’s possible when we work together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
We’re rebuilding thousands of bridges in Ohio and across the country -- including the Brent Spence |
---

| | | | Recently, I joined President Biden and other leaders to celebrate the Brent Spence Bridge project in Cincinnati. The infrastructure law is already making Ohio bridges safer -- starting in Cincinnati. And I’m going to make sure Ohio gets its fair share of infrastructure funding. [_**We couldn’t have gotten this done without the support of people like you, and I’m counting on your continued support as my race ramps up. Will you join our movement today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57213932/387179161/-1494296121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY2NGNkNi1mMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GOyul8HQTZ-2tMJYdP6_iIUKqoCVcdSLzSMWiaDOgo=&emci=715cfd2c-e091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=cd664cd6-f191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
---
| | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57213933/387179162/-1494296121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY2NGNkNi1mMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GOyul8HQTZ-2tMJYdP6_iIUKqoCVcdSLzSMWiaDOgo=&emci=715cfd2c-e091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=cd664cd6-f191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**
---
This moment was made possible by the bipartisan infrastructure bill I helped write and pass last year. We’re rebuilding thousands of bridges in Ohio and across the country -- including the Brent Spence -- that have been in desperate need of repairs for years. And we’re creating good-paying American jobs using American-made iron, steel, and other products while doing it. This is what’s possible when we work together to find common ground and deliver for working people. The infrastructure bill will mean more good-paying, union jobs in Ohio for years to come and investments in communities that have been preyed on by Wall Street for far too long. I want to continue delivering the results Ohioans need, but I’m up for re-election next year in one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country and need your help. [_**We’re building a coalition to win, and I need you to be a part of it. Will you sign on your support for our campaign so we can continue delivering for Ohio, together?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57213934/387179163/-1494296121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY2NGNkNi1mMTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GOyul8HQTZ-2tMJYdP6_iIUKqoCVcdSLzSMWiaDOgo=&emci=715cfd2c-e091-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=cd664cd6-f191-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

clean_body: | | | | | Big things are happening, friend! Now that Tom Kean is officially sworn into office and has his office up and running, he’s turning his attention towards working to make life better in New Jersey and beyond. Tom is ready to tackle the toughest challenges head on. And he wants to hear from Americans like you! Which issue is your top priority? From fighting inflation to keeping our communities safe, Tom will work tirelessly to fix the failed policies that have hurt so many of us. With your input, he’ll be able to better focus on what you think matters most. Thank you, Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. Friend,

A U.S. Appeals Court has ruled in favor of the American People – wearing a**MAGA Hat** is nothing more than the American People exercising their freedom of speech.
**This is a great decision for all of those that love our Country AND our FIRST AMENDMENT RIGHTS.

_MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_**
Our MAGA movement is by far the _**GREATEST**_ political movement in the history of our Country. _And you know what it really stands for? Loving our Country,**that's all it is.**_

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: For IMMEDIATE RELEASE - Endorsement
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hUYAsmadoQve0iI&b=hCtJZ2TCHVcyaRw_5e78JQ)
---

> # DR. STEVEN HATFILL, VIROLOGIST AND MEDICAL ADVISOR TO THE TRUMP WHITE HOUSE, ENDORSES RYAN CHAMBERLIN FOR STATE REPRESENTATIVE!
> FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
> January 11, 2023
>
> **Contact:** Matt Doster
> **Phone:** (850) 222-8156
> **Email:** [press@flspr.com](mailto:press@flspr.com "mailto:press@flspr.com")
>
> **Belleview, Fla.** — Today, Ryan Chamberlin announced the endorsement of Dr. Steven Hatfill. Dr. Hatfill is a specialist and virologist with two decades of experience in Central and Southern Africa and held medical fellowships at Oxford University, the National Institutes of Health in Bethesda, and the National Research Council where he studied the Ebola virus at the US Army Institute for Infectious Diseases.
>
> “I’m honored to endorse Ryan Chamberlin’s race in District 24,” said Dr. Hatfill. “He is a dedicated family man who has been a strong advocate for the pro-life movement and information-based decision making. We can count on Ryan to stand with Governor DeSantis to protect Florida from the Biden White House and a Washington establishment that used the Covid crisis to force a political agenda on the American people.”
>
> “Dr. Hatfill is a credit to his profession,” said Ryan Chamberlin. “I’m grateful for his endorsement and support, and I will do everything in my power to protect the families and small businesses of Florida from the overreach of a federal government gone wild.”
>
> Ryan Chamberlin is an Author, Speaker, and Consultant that has been working for the last 2 years to launch The True Patriot Network (TPN), a conservative social media and news platform supporting strong American values. Ryan has worked with Success Magazine, speaks regularly at national conferences, and recently co-authored his 5th book titled Think Big which became an international bestseller in May of 2022. His 3rd book titled The Rich You Formula was co-authored with the late relationship expert Gary Smalley and endorsed by Mike Huckabee. Ryan has been married to Jenny Chamberlin for 28 years. They met at Souls Harbor First Pentecostal Church in 1989, where they still attend.

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsbIyMHAys) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsbIyMHAys)

| | | Hi, it’s Chuck with an exciting announcement. **Sen. Gary Peters will be _returning_ as Chair of the DSCC for the 2024 elections!**

Sen. Peters is a battle-tested, proven winner who defied the pundits and led Senate Democrats to victory in 2022. I know that with him leading the charge, we'll be in a **_rock-solid_** position to defend our majority again next year.

**To help Sen. Peters and the DSCC Team kick off the upcoming campaign as strongly as possible, I’ve authorized a one-time Triple-Impact Match -- but it's only active until midnight tonight.**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter, In our latest priorities survey, I heard so many people voice their concerns about the future of the USPS under Louis DeJoy. **I agree, and I’m ready to take action.** Since former President Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use. DeJoy enacted massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election. Not only that, but late last year, a federal judge ruled that DeJoy’s harmful policies right before the 2020 elections harmed delivery. Seems awfully convenient that in a year with record-breaking vote-by-mail, Trump’s hand-picked appointee enacted changes that hurt delivery services. Enough is enough — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he degrades the USPS any further. **[If you agree, add your name today to our petition to call on the USPS Board of Governors to remove DeJoy from office as soon as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57216205/387189406/-1382300810?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230111_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ4MjFhZC1mZTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmVZg_jiBNSO-IdMDWsf09-GmFM5frz0ZOD9jPBpwaA=&emci=0dd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0fd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=35007871)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57216206/387189407/-1382300810?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230111_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ4MjFhZC1mZTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmVZg_jiBNSO-IdMDWsf09-GmFM5frz0ZOD9jPBpwaA=&emci=0dd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0fd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=35007871)
---
Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why I made sure passing legislation to improve the USPS was a priority last year. But Louis DeJoy has more than proved how little he cares about the future of the USPS.
In 2022, we passed major bills to improve the USPS, including the _Postal Service Reform Act_ and the _Inflation Reduction Act,_ which allocated $3 billion to electrify our mail delivery services. In fact, a company based right here in Wisconsin is building thousands of electric mail trucks. **This is a win for our economy, our environment, and our mailing service — no thanks to Louis DeJoy.**
The USPS is a fundamental service for all Americans. We can’t let DeJoy slow down or dismantle the postal service’s progress any longer. **[If you’re with me, sign my petition calling for DeJoy’s removal from office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57216207/387189408/-1382300810?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230111_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmQ4MjFhZC1mZTkxLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmVZg_jiBNSO-IdMDWsf09-GmFM5frz0ZOD9jPBpwaA=&emci=0dd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=0fd821ad-fe91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=35007871)**

clean_body: | Peter, In our latest priorities survey, I heard so many people voice their concerns about the future of the USPS under Louis DeJoy. I agree, and I’m ready to take action. Since former President Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use. DeJoy enacted massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election. Not only that, but late last year, a federal judge ruled that DeJoy’s harmful policies right before the 2020 elections harmed delivery. Seems awfully convenient that in a year with record-breaking vote-by-mail, Trump’s hand-picked appointee enacted changes that hurt delivery services. Enough is enough — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he degrades the USPS any further. | | Millions of Americans rely on the postal service for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why I made sure passing legislation to improve the USPS was a priority last year. But Louis DeJoy has more than proved how little he cares about the future of the USPS. In 2022, we passed major bills to improve the USPS, including the Postal Service Reform Act and the Inflation Reduction Act, which allocated $3 billion to electrify our mail delivery services. In fact, a company based right here in Wisconsin is building thousands of electric mail trucks. This is a win for our economy, our environment, and our mailing service — no thanks to Louis DeJoy. The USPS is a fundamental service for all Americans. We can’t let DeJoy slow down or dismantle the postal service’s progress any longer. | Thank you for using your voice to bring awareness to this critical issue, — Tammy PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

| | | Friend,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It 's because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

I am 100% funded by the people because that's the **ONLY** constituency I swore to serve. I stood up for you when it mattered, and [_**now I 'm asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 today.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a9ff5727dfe4145be0041fbda9fd009&_e=QnXO3ygASamcVUJR0NUUNmKnEfFdfFy-U5n1EywMS297ZlTnfvSMBIdOSdQnIRGnZZta8yOw0kCcYm5UfvklQdS1MLmg1PbvNjrPD52HR__rYKXHt02vC_VRVlOKxUUZa2N3lVdWJrXYtraFyjcIwXJTscMjAx_dRmE0Sf-hRNH2ZNZ8PlpLAcVVn-ChoazQejC218rukpHhJcaIQmuvew3T8dK6J6jJlzgvjFQ1If2kRp57OJk1u1AF0HHEQ83Pq6tpLyYydNwb9nDALRFMVyXXBU0kwSYMY6_nzRGBx0w%3D)

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. name: Garrett Arwa, NDRC
subject: [invitation pending] help inform our strategy for 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
take our quick survey now
|
---

Team, the NDRC’s movement to defend democracy and fair elections won some important victories in 2022. Across the country, we helped elect dozens of Democracy Defenders, defeat election deniers in swing states, flip control of multiple state legislative chambers, and more.

**Our success in 2022 would not have been possible without this grassroots team. Now, we’re reaching out to our top supporters to help us shape our strategy in 2023.[_Will you take a few moments to weigh in?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57216786/387192024/2035740094?refcode=20230111.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYjBmOGI3LTAzOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zztQuu-Ml8yLd5SkE7oEU7r2OpGARMV7TkZVdv3Qiww=&emci=ca9ee019-ca91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=03b0f8b7-0392-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)** | **2023 NDRC Strategy Survey**
Survey prepared for dpwillis67@gmail.com
Estimated time to complete: 5 minutes | [Begin Survey](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57216787/387192025/2035740094?refcode=20230111.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzYjBmOGI3LTAzOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zztQuu-Ml8yLd5SkE7oEU7r2OpGARMV7TkZVdv3Qiww=&emci=ca9ee019-ca91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=03b0f8b7-0392-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)
---
While we’ve made incredible headway, it’s critical that we keep these wise words from President Barack Obama top of mind: **“Democracy is fragile. You have to tend to it, you have to fight for it.”** _That’s why the NDRC is committed to building on the progress we’ve made!_

**Supporters like you are the lifeblood of this movement, team, so we hope you’ll take the time to complete our quick survey.**

name: Team Slotkin
subject: The definition of Midwestern leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230111 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230111]
Team,
If there’s one thing that 2023 has already shown, it’s that our country is in need of Midwestern leadership.
Amidst a chaotic start to the 118th Congress (in which we went nearly a full week without a House of Representatives), Senator Debbie Stabenow announced that she would not be running for reelection in 2024. She embodies the thoughtful, pragmatic, and decent leadership that many have come to associate with the Midwest.
She talks to everyone, shows up in small towns and big cities alike, and is focused on results rather than rhetoric. Her leadership stands in stark contrast to what we’ve seen in the House over the past two weeks. Her retirement is a huge loss for Michigan.
Elissa has gotten a front row seat to Sen. Stabenow’s pragmatic approach. In fact, Elissa represents the same area of mid-Michigan that the Senator did back when she was a member of the House. Back in 2018, Elissa became the first Democrat to represent mid-Michigan in the House since Sen. Stabenow was elected to the Senate in 2000.
The Senator has been the leader in Michigan on how to win competitive races in a politically diverse state. And that’s why her announcement last week leaves such a big hole in Michigan politics.
If you support the Midwestern leadership Sen. Stabenow has brought to Michigan, chip in below. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230111] It’s vital we continue to elect leaders in Congress that know that mission-driven still matters.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230111]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 4145,
EAST LANSING, MI 48826

name: Rapid Response Poll (via DLCC.org)
subject: Will you represent your community and let us know if you support reforming the Electoral College?
body:
Democrats like Sen. Amy Klobuchar are sounding the alarm for Electoral College reform: | | |
---
| | **Democrats like Sen. Amy Klobuchar are sounding the alarm for Electoral College reform:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TYoydMZDlXCCvTg4v_DWKqfib3i8njZtMspNq5-ns-zuPnVk7KIW-yQ-XmN1379eFB3pc3SnI4hn_pd2NFD8goOWVc_886Ek622z3FAaMBMhw0qE7xuruYC2fbmKakEfBjizeT1eOQU2xxg93ujbtq-jwIisNaBqYQWx9MlqQzdnsrLS-pDOgwXNXPGajBBK56pmJPdFyNZTzVJTobZaMEy1LpAw7yrIfA5sbFr9pusjitoCGYONz2_EPf7j3kr5oPRcpGJ5PwmCnrPDOt2P_S3GUuJHesfBoowo0ZF7ZZkI_PQaAtQx6-uQwp44P-gCvcqQ7AGcC_2b1T6sZDZauGxSljP50qGzwr5UrQhTJ-SZtYYG6d-3cYfPHoj3JBOkIq6TuPEL8652dhLgpi0G2IFaohO15SUo7QPcw42xYNKH0VVUXwrdaUAIes8qtqugW0UD5oSJyNLkVNcf0VvUMS-excr4omwjoDdoKk2VeNeDt8oQRN0kQyq6cJoiu2ur5i6rF_xnbN6draVQQtU6E_GfOeBCiDlTXMg9dvLS542AzEVQhYD1K0a6oITxpTxT1B3wo1FsLmFpwWcHRmWlUaELGNvduBeZ8bVpSB7uL0vH2BGPD015_Xioo4nFWmIL8lDO-LnZNeHHhxwRMcUiVNq7QrYrAMbbLJhV4480c0PgINiyyQJUwXI9GdxOT2SEv5PrxY9cOomvDdm0uj6HnHYtdlUuYuBaWoLyG49KfTsnPW6_RWiVVw4TBIXBjBbg3w/3sr/Q_QlBe7tQdykNpNarbuYsg/h0/E5TT_tKwa7nlk0jwyajx9GBppEYNSFEUjHcFnvPA8A8) She’s 100% right! Trump’s attempts to overturn the 2020 election by using the Electoral Count Act showed how vulnerable our democracy is – and how important it is to protect it. The American people should be able to cast their vote confidently – knowing that the election results of their state will be honored and respected through a peaceful transition of power. That’s why many Democrats support reforming the Electoral College. clean_body: Democrats like Sen. Amy Klobuchar are sounding the alarm for Electoral College reform: | | | | | Democrats like Sen. Amy Klobuchar are sounding the alarm for Electoral College reform: She’s 100% right! Trump’s attempts to overturn the 2020 election by using the Electoral Count Act showed how vulnerable our democracy is – and how important it is to protect it. The American people should be able to cast their vote confidently – knowing that the election results of their state will be honored and respected through a peaceful transition of power. That’s why many Democrats support reforming the Electoral College. | Do you support reforming the Electoral College? clean_body: How should I start my term in the Senate? | | | Peter, I promised you from day one that I’d arrive in Washington ready to get to work to save our country and fight for our values. We have a lot of work to do to hold the Biden administration accountable for its failures. That’s why I’m enlisting YOUR HELP to decide which issue I should tackle first. I am so grateful to you for entrusting me with this office. As long as I’m in Washington, I promise to never stop fighting for our shared Conservative values. Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Team Katie Porter for California
subject: Some whiteboard math for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Check out our whiteboard math for today
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)
Derek, we’re going to break out some whiteboard math in a moment.
First, though, we’ve seen a _huge_ outpouring of support since Katie announced her campaign for Senate yesterday.
Now we need to turn this initial support into long-term momentum. Because, while we’re starting this campaign off strong, **we have nearly two years until the general election.**
It’s going to take a lot of resources for us to run a top-tier, competitive campaign in the most populous state in the union for most of the next two years.
**That’s where you come in:** by signing up to make a monthly sustaining contribution to our campaign today, you can make sure we’ll have the resources we need to stay competitive through Election Day.
**[So will you please sign up to make a monthly sustaining contribution to Katie Porter for California today? We’re going to need every grassroots dollar we can raise to stay competitive.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14656?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=2&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14663?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F-el&t=3&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14664?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14665?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14666?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14667?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14656?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=8&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)
---
Here’s today’s whiteboard moment—we’re going to do some quick math:
We have 22 months until the general election. If you sign up today, here’s how much you could end up giving before Election Day:
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14656?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=9&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)
**In other words, committing to $10, $25, or $50 a month makes a real difference in our campaign.**
And that reliable monthly revenue will translate into more volunteers, more doors knocked on, more phone calls made, more ads run, more emails and text messages sent, more campaign events, and just more of the day-to-day work that wins campaigns.
**[And, with your support, we will win this campaign. So please help us keep going strong by making a monthly sustaining contribution today—even $3 a month would be a huge help!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14656?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=10&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)**
Thanks,
Team Katie Porter for California
P.S. If you signed up for a recurring donation in months past, thank you! That was a recurring donation for Katie’s House campaign. Now that she’s running for Senate, you’ll need to sign up for a new recurring contribution—**[you can do so with this link.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14656?refcode=EMAF11_3_LAU_20230111_V1_F&t=11&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)** Thank you SO much for your continued support!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=12&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=15686%2E3422442%2EU9UKaM)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFGqyZFiMsnvAE1Jh6u4hprBSuv1DHwPeMk1Itb7A4Z9SS4FKSIlksagMNyqlYbKpWqg-zYgROmvPT_VRUcYGnBH9sjHPX27G6aD8N6zbBo2fCR_MY84qlYzA0uOWlT_vU32RhvkIeaa8Lh3KP1Mc5Wog%3D%3D)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFGfHQTsVMHxGPEPe8B-QuYt6KuU8K7AFB_C61-dDQsysKeh1T37BjYPjXrzjRquhnHSvI1c2M73rBPczyCO2G0YViNs-87dbhZjV6z6j2cGwxbQUCa63aJAnSaTUPJxYMnAaMLsWRN0LuQ223jT_7KnA%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFGnZL1M-7RPEI6OaS1Dx1ErwZNI-kFpiT4ZOdAdNACqQIx0DzmaCd_UIBqpEWgQwSXczPkPXL_19TQIEtNabyqI7cLe5JY9QEBocCcydj3C2gjzHwAddkrdwRNian0X9paLgavpVMk1f_dkLbznlWi4Q%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFGjWATs2U1D6tidjJfSVLXTq6wiMfR5-MR_ydy84aW0OQ76NcXwGCZOUHnZPGDJy9uEfc_LKWvMMyVd9psUmw2RBt7N-toG9OICFW4DHjN59jWKCe5GxmG9Ym9TnkNxcSWl1N2u77_Zp8Z-RrgEmsErg%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFG7nhp8DyqU8DL0KB38YFo2OIPzqtNwSfX20d2ZBCyR0Wq1oaCSnYp5V2Er35v03RK9fTMKziUXY9gOSodTjIpPMey4Tp-OrKNcjaawFl7aCTnN_Now3wTxOobxgk_nkYgjP6PJ91n1vZoncUmADzKrQ%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fcbe4d499d544bd6957a720ae466c322&_e=8sj2TEsGXPYGtMirpt5XuviYO0_oN2AOqdnmISC0W03jOiCK0gqaZFzmEk-mdl_GLamypDBwGUwBz7sV2WHns27zGvLIhwTrTuSh3b699k63l_ZgBiSctlJ8RKOFHVOc1gSXFWWKyDC21tuNjyyzgcZo34RGiSDDEQRnSTDGzdiSi-SlA_n5AYqx5lD8rkFGS8_JN9iOgAuCyhmowdocKVBwUTqe7cPBlovndZ1dku9cwH5b_xoQwaSq7D29WNKzytRa0mN-a--7_5yCcc_yFlmJtk0ZHCj9TAvDjLfwj_vv5_Pl7HC5h79hd9zuQHduEBM4tcYWQ6MHKgcvMpuK1g%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Carey?=
subject: 🚨Rep. Carey to Serve on Prestigious Ways & Means Committee
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikecareywm?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear friend, Today Congressman Mike Carey was selected to serve on the prestigious House Committee on Ways and Means. As a supporter and friend of our campaign, we wanted to share this fantastic news with you first:

“It is truly an honor and privilege to be selected to serve on the Ways and Means committee during the 118th Congress,” Rep. Carey said. “I am excited to work alongside Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Chairman Jason Smith, and our Republican majority as we develop tax, trade, healthcare and many other solutions to lower costs for the American people and get our economy back on track. Earning a place on this prestigious committee is something I have worked very hard for, but it would not have been possible without your consistent support. Thank you for all you have done to help me continue my work on behalf of Ohio’s 15th Congressional District on the Ways and Means Committee.”

Upon announcing the newest members of Ways and Means, Chairman Jason Smith stated:

“Congressman Carey will be a valuable member of the Ways and Means Committee on behalf of his constituents. Rep. Carey’s background in the energy sector will make an excellent addition to the committee as we work to unleash American energy independence and reduce barriers to energy production in our tax code. America is facing multiple crises after two years of Democrat one-party rule. The Ways and Means Committee is ready to get to work building a stronger economy that will help working families, tackle inflation, lower taxes, and promote investment in America.”
---
| **About the Ways and Means Committee:** The Committee on Ways and Means is the oldest committee of the United States Congress and serves as the chief tax-writing committee in the House of Representatives. The Committee derives much of its jurisdiction from Article I, Section VII of the Constitution which declares, “All Bills for raising Revenue shall originate in the House of Representatives.” In addition to serving as the chief tax-writing committee, Ways and Means also has jurisdiction over revenue and related issues such as tariffs, reciprocal trade agreements, and the bonded debt of the United States. The Committee also oversees revenue-related aspects of the Social Security system, Medicare, and social services programs.
---
| | | | | | [](https://CareyForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7159c791b9aebaf10c300cf35&id=9257a27e0f&e=f89184af42)
---

Paid by Carey for Congress

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Budget cuts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats isn’t like most other political organizations. From the
very start in 2016, we were a scrappy group funded by people just like
you. We’re still funded by people just like you.

Our fundraising pales in comparison to the scale of work we do — searching
for, recruiting, training, embedding with, and helping to elect
progressive candidates, all without a dime of corporate PAC money. And we
do it year-round, cycle after cycle.

Our budget is small, but every dollar is crucial. And our fundraising has
been dropping month after month — meaning our budget is increasingly in
danger.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124777?refcode=em20230111-27007&t=1001&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P- ]It’s now or never,
Peter. We’re asking you to chip
in $3, or any amount, to help us stabilize our fundraising
at this critical juncture. Will you rush a donation now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124777?refcode=em20230111-27007&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P- ]Contribute $3

We make every dollar stretch as far as possible, because we understand how
precious your contributions are. We understand that the odds are stacked
against working class people running for Congress. And we understand that
the establishment will throw everything they have at our candidates to
keep them out.

From the beginning, all of our work at Justice Democrats has been there to
support insurgent progressive candidates in every way we possibly can — to
make it easier for them to run, and win.

We can only do that if we raise all the money we need to fund our own
operations, and the reality is that if our fundraising continues to drop
off, we will have to cut back our budget.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124777?refcode=em20230111-27007&t=1021&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P- ]So what do you say? Can you contribute $3 or more today
to boost our fundraising and provide for all of our critical programs?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P- ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P- ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230111-27007-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27007_1203867_aCL6P-&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27007%2E1203867%2EaCL6P-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | When the Fair Fight team pushes to make voting more accessible in a state like Georgia, we mobilize advocates for on-the-ground action. But behind that group is an even bigger movement, with thousands of donors who chip in $5, $10, or $20 to make everything possible. With you by our side as we hit the ground running in 2023, we’ll continue to work tirelessly to protect the freedom to vote. And we’ll continue to stand up against anti-voter politicians who try desperately to silence our voices and stifle our power. In the last decade, I’ve seen a big shift in progressive fundraising. More and more, the number of people who are getting involved and chipping in is the number that matters most, because it shows the depth, breadth, and power of our team. $5 alone could be a poster in a rally for voting rights, and when added to many other online donations, it becomes a well-organized march that demands to be heard. **Our strength is in numbers and with supporters like you, we can grow even stronger.** As we dive into this new year, there will only be more opportunities to continue making tangible change in our communities. And we’ll need to scale up our efforts to protect the freedom to vote in elections to come. The fact is, what we raise in 2023 will decide how much we can invest in electing more pro-democracy candidates, expanding ballot access, and shattering voter turnout records in 2024. So thank you in advance for sticking with us for the work to come! In solidarity, Emily Laskar

name: Mark Takano
subject: Finally sworn in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Here’s what we’re up against:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217389/387194738/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzg4N2E2Zi0wOTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kN3d3GFrGNF6XKAE2UKBDFsEooOQ2UT5t0q-BLS9KYI=)
---
**Peter, last Friday, I was finally sworn in to Congress – representing California’s new 39th district!** But sadly, the beginning of this new Congress was marred by extreme dysfunction and chaos.**Welcome to the GOP majority.**

[**Will you help me hold the MAGA Party accountable with a $3 donation right now? Democrats are united, and I hope you’re with us — chip in $3 now to keep GOP traitors in check »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217390/387194739/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230111_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzg4N2E2Zi0wOTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kN3d3GFrGNF6XKAE2UKBDFsEooOQ2UT5t0q-BLS9KYI=) | [500 DONATION GOAL: CHIP IN $3 RIGHT NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217391/387194740/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230111_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzg4N2E2Zi0wOTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kN3d3GFrGNF6XKAE2UKBDFsEooOQ2UT5t0q-BLS9KYI=)
---
The Republican Party’s hard-right group of extremists is the House Freedom Caucus. And Speaker McCarthy has allowed this group of conspiracy theorists and liars to poison the GOP and the integrity of Congress.

This fringe minority doesn’t represent the American people!

➡️ They’ve made a mockery of the People’s House.
➡️ They spent a week bickering over who to elect as Speaker.
➡️ They have no vision or policy agenda.
➡️ Their only goal is to sow conflict and chaos.

body:
Republicans' first order of business was legislation to make it easier for billionaires and corporations to avoid paying their fair share of taxes.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217462/387195014/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBmNDAwMS0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGoo-gXZPmWNzwOcqNqNsetmjqaaH8uXRmKg_SJYVYE=)
---
Well, that was predictable: **the first piece of legislation the new GOP House majority had us vote on was a bill that would make it easier for billionaires and corporations to avoid paying their fair share of taxes.**

Democrats passed the Inflation Reduction Act last year to help working families — and as part of that bill, we made sure to crack down on those who try to cheat the tax code. It's not fair to the millions of Americans who play by the rules, and it was long past time that we empower our federal agencies to better crack down on fraud.

Now, Republicans want to _roll that back._

[**If you're as outraged as I am, please join me and sign your name to say that you support a fair tax code and cracking down on fraud. If we get 5,000 signatures by Friday, we'll send a powerful message that Americans are rejecting the House GOP's out-of-touch agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217463/387195015/-1833057501?ms=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBmNDAwMS0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGoo-gXZPmWNzwOcqNqNsetmjqaaH8uXRmKg_SJYVYE=&emci=2cbf3013-0092-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3e0f4001-0a92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217464/387195016/-1833057501?ms=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBmNDAwMS0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGoo-gXZPmWNzwOcqNqNsetmjqaaH8uXRmKg_SJYVYE=&emci=2cbf3013-0092-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3e0f4001-0a92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) The contrast between the two parties couldn't be more clear on this. And as we prepare to take back the House in 2024, we need to do everything we can to emphasize how Democrats have fought for a level playing field – against Republican opposition.

That's why your voice matters on this.

[**So please, add your name now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57217465/387195017/-1833057501?ms=EM_PET_230111Tax_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_220720SSM_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTBmNDAwMS0wYTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGoo-gXZPmWNzwOcqNqNsetmjqaaH8uXRmKg_SJYVYE=&emci=2cbf3013-0092-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3e0f4001-0a92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)
